>>>Scope of Work

Build HTML5 digital banner ads from approved designs

Adapt creative across multiple banner sizes and formats

Implement animation, transitions, and click functionality

Optimize files for performance, file weight, and cross-browser compatibility

QA all units for design accuracy, animation behavior, and technical compliance

Package and deliver final files according to platform or vendor specs

Troubleshoot build issues and ensure final assets are production-ready



>>>Requirements

Proven experience building HTML5 banner ads

Strong command of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript

Experience with standard banner production specs and file-size limitations

Ability to work from approved design files and maintain visual consistency across sizes

Strong QA discipline and attention to detail

Ability to manage timelines and deliver clean, organized files



>>>Preferred

Experience with Google Web Designer, Adobe Animate, or similar tools

Familiarity with click tags, trackers, and ad platform requirements

Experience with luxury, lifestyle, hospitality, or real estate creative

Strong sense of motion, pacing, and clean visual execution



>>>>Contract Type

Freelance / independent contractor

Project-based engagement

Remote

Paid per project or agreed hourly/day rate

Ideal Fit



You are efficient, responsive, technically sharp, and able to take an approved design direction through build, QA, and final delivery without a lot of hand-holding.





Please send:



A short intro

Relevant HTML5 banner examples

Your rate structure

Availability

Estimated turnaround time for a standard 6-size banner set

title: Customer Service Member
description:
Remote Customer Service Member (Work from Home)

Independent Contractor



A prominent and growing North American facilities services organization is expanding its remote operations support and is seeking dependable, detail-oriented customer support professionals. This is a work-from-home contractor engagement supporting commercial and retail clients across Canada.



This is an independent contractor engagement, paid weekly upon receipt of invoice. The schedule is 9-hour shifts, five (5) days per week. Occasional Saturday shifts (approximately once per month) may be required. Shifts align with Eastern Standard Time: 8:00–5:00, 9:00–6:00, or 10:00–7:00 EST.



Role Overview

This is a dynamic, high-energy administrative and customer support position where every day brings new experiences and opportunities for professional growth. The role involves real-time coordination via Zoom and other internal systems to progress various tasks.



As an independent contractor working with our Customer Service Team, you’ll play a key role in maintaining the efficient flow of work orders through our systems and processes. 



Based on your skills and interests, you’ll be assigned to one of our specialized sub-teams:



•
ing Team: Monitor and manage an inbox with thousands of daily incoming
s, sort and flag urgent or high-priority
s, and collaborate with relevant teams.

• Scheduling Team: Dispatch and schedule work orders with technicians to ensure timely completion.

• Compiling Team: Handle compiling tasks, including before/after photos, invoices, sign-offs, assisting with month-end closures, and answering phones.

• Check-In/Out Team: Sign in technicians as they arrive on-site for jobs, address any issues or scope changes, and ensure smooth operations while technicians are on location.



Each sub-team works collaboratively to deliver exceptional service while minimizing bottlenecks in our workflows.



Requirements for Home Office Set Up:

• Windows PC preferred, running Windows 11

• Minimum 300 Mbps internet speed; Fibre connection strongly preferred

• Multiple monitors required (single monitor setups not suitable)

• High-quality headset with a microphone and a Reliable webcam

• Quiet, professional workspace suitable for full-day Zoom collaboration

Traits We Are Seeking:

Organization: You can handle high
 volumes, prioritize tasks, and keep everything on track.

Problem-solving: You take initiative, think independently, and easily resolve issues.

Collaborative Communicator: You work confidently with others, fostering accountability and motivation. You are a positive, self-motivated individual with clear communication.

Composed Under Pressure: You enjoy working within tight deadlines and fast-paced environments. 

Proven work history: You are looking for a long-term opportunity and have a proven track record. Experience in virtual assistance, remote administrative roles, or customer service preferred.

Strong technical Skills: You have in-depth technical skills with the ability to work in several systems and databases at one time

title: Website SEO Specialist
description:
The Website SEO Specialist leads the charge in optimizing our website's performance and driving the growth of organic traffic. As part of this role, you'll be at the forefront of boosting our online visibility and attaining top search engine rankings. We're looking for someone with a strategic mindset, a profound enthusiasm for SEO, and an unyielding dedication to delivering measurable outcomes. An SEO Specialist will play a pivotal role in refining our online presence to achieve unmatched success.

title: Creative Generalist & Creative Strategist
description:

We’re hiring a Creative Generalist with strong design and video editing chops to produce compelling visual assets for our paid media campaigns, landing pages, and brand communication. This hybrid role supports 2–3 DTC brands to start and is perfect for someone who thrives on fast-paced creative production, balancing aesthetics with performance goals. - Repurpose testimonials, reviews, and influencer content for paid and organic use

- Create
, SMS, and promotional visuals aligned with brand identity

- Stylize social proof assets (e.g., screenshots, quotes) into branded, engaging formats

- Follow platform-specific best practices for ad creatives

- Ensure design supports performance goals like ROAS and CAC

- Maintain brand consistency across diverse formats and placements

- Collaborate with media buyers, marketers, and creatives to meet campaign goals

- Stay current with trends in ad design and DTC creative performance



Qualifications:

- At least 2 years of experience in graphic design and video editing for digital marketing.

- Advanced skills in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, After Effects).

- Proven experience creating high-converting static and motion ads for Meta, TikTok, or Google.

- Strong eye for layout, color, typography, and brand consistency.

- Experience editing UGC and social proof content for performance-driven campaigns.

- Able to follow creative briefs, meet tight deadlines, and collaborate well with remote teams.

- Portfolio demonstrating versatility across static design, motion, and video editing.





-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------





CREATIVE STRATEGIST



The Creative Strategist will own the research, ideation, and optimization of creative assets across paid ads,
/SMS, landing pages, and UGC. They'll translate brand goals, market data, and consumer psychology into briefs, scripts, and testing roadmaps, partnering with designers, editors, media buyers, and UGC creators to execute.



This role focuses on conversion optimization and creative direction — guiding creative generalists, reviewing and approving output, and ensuring all creatives are aligned with CRO goals. The strategist does not handle direct web design, but must have strong CRO experience to boost campaign effectiveness.



Key Responsibilities:

- Analyze client creative performance, benchmark competitors, and identify positioning and messaging opportunities across the full funnel.

- Develop creative roadmaps for DTC brands, concept new hooks and angles, and build testing frameworks across multiple ad formats.

- Create detailed UGC briefs, collaborate with creators through production, and curate social proof for ads and owned channels.

- Partner with media buyers and cross-functional teams to ensure creative aligns with funnel stages, KPIs, and brand standards.

- Guide creative generalists and support
/SMS and CRO-focused landing page strategy without executing web design.

- Track and interpret performance data, document insights, and iterate continuously to optimize campaigns.

- Present strategies, testing plans, and performance recaps to clients and internal leadership to support retention and revenue goals.



Qualifications:

- Proven experience in Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) and creative strategy for digital marketing.

- Strong leadership and feedback skills to guide generalists and align creative output with performance goals.

title: Outbound Sales Development Representative and Cold Call Sales Specialist
description:
OUTBOUND SALES DEVELOPMENT REPRESENTATIVE



This role is strategically focused on generating new business opportunities through targeted outbound outreach. The Outbound SDR serves as the first point of contact for potential clients, identifying prospects, initiating conversations, and driving them into the sales pipeline. You will manage outbound campaigns, conduct personalized outreach, and build strong engagement with high-value leads. This position requires strong persistence, excellent communication skills, and the ability to build effective processes for high-touch outbound engagement.



Goal:

To create a steady flow of qualified outbound opportunities by identifying, engaging, and advancing potential clients into meaningful sales conversations.



Key Responsibilities:

- Outbound Prospecting: Identify and target potential clients through
, calls, and social outreach to generate qualified leads for the sales team.

- Personalized Outreach: Create tailored messaging for specific industries, decision-makers, or company profiles to increase engagement and response rates.

- Pipeline Generation: Build and maintain a strong pipeline of outbound leads, ensuring consistent activity and follow-ups.

- Lead Qualification: Evaluate outbound prospects to ensure alignment with service offerings and pass qualified opportunities to the sales team.

- Collaboration With Sales & Marketing: Work closely with sales to refine ideal client profiles and with marketing to improve outbound messaging and campaign performance.

- CRM Management: Keep detailed, accurate records of outreach activity, follow-ups, and prospect interactions within the CRM.

- Process Building & Optimization: Develop, refine, and scale processes for efficient and high-touch outbound engagement.



Qualifications:

- Experience in outbound sales, lead generation, or a similar role is preferred.

- Strong organizational skills with excellent attention to detail.

- Proven track record of consistently meeting or exceeding outreach and pipeline targets.

- Advanced knowledge of HubSpot preferred; experience with other CRM tools is a plus.

- Exceptional verbal and written communication skills

- Motivated self-starter with the ability to work independently and drive tasks forward.

- Comfortable with leadership, taking initiative, and improving workflows.

- Strong interpersonal skills: able to communicate value clearly, handle objections, and build rapport during outbound conversations.

- Has a history of building processes around high-touch outbound client engagement.



---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



COLD CALL SALES SPECIALIST



Responsible for identifying and reaching out to potential clients, scheduling appointments for the sales team, and assisting with the sales process. If you're passionate about building connections (calling strangers non-stop), creating opportunities, and driving growth, this could be the perfect role for you! As a Cold Call Sales Specialist, you will be an integral part of our sales team, helping us connect with potential clients and open doors to exciting business ventures.



Responsibilities:

- Prospecting for new businesses to develop relationships

- Building and maintaining a database with potentially interested prospects and following up on future business opportunities

- Tracking and reporting on account activity

- Making outbound calls/processing inbound calls to achieve weekly and monthly goals

- Qualifying leads and setting appointments for the Sales Team

- Setting demo schedules for the Sales team

-
 Marketing and follow-ups

- Explaining basic features and services being offered to the clients

- Other related duties as assigned



Qualifications:

- Proven experience as an Appointment Setter, Cold Caller, Telemarketer, or Leads Generation Specialist.

- Demonstrated track record of over-achieving targets

- Motivated, Driven, Tech Savvy, Sociable Go Getters (No experience required, we will train the right candidate)

title: Health Appointment Setter — US Based Clients
description:
VERY IMPORTANT: SEND A VOICE RECORDING/LOOM VIDEO WITH YOUR APPLICATION + WRITE DOWN HEALTHCARE EXPERIENCE.



About the role



We run patient acquisition campaigns for stem cell and regenerative medicine clinics across the US. Our ads generate inbound leads daily — your job is to contact those leads quickly, qualify them, and book them onto a Zoom call with our senior closer.



You don't need to know anything about stem cells on day one — we provide full training on the treatments, patient pain points, and our qualification script. What we can't train is hunger, reliability, and the ability to hold a real conversation.



What you'll do day-to-day

Follow up with inbound leads by phone, SMS, and DM within minutes of them coming in

Run through a qualification script to identify if the prospect is a good fit

Book qualified prospects into the calendar for a Zoom consultation

Log all activity and update contact records in our CRM (GoHighLevel)

Follow up with no-shows and reschedule them



What we're looking for

GHL Experience

At least 1 year of experience in a sales, appointment setting, or customer-facing role

Excellent spoken and written English — you'll be speaking with US-based patients

Fast, reliable internet connection and a quiet working environment

Comfortable making high volumes of outbound calls and follow-ups

Coachable — we have a proven script and process; you follow it and improve over time

description:

This is a full-time role ideal for someone who is organized, dependable, and an excellent communicator. If you enjoy coordinating schedules, speaking with customers, and helping businesses run efficiently, this position is for you!



Key Responsibilities



-Schedule and manage in-person appointments for multiple clients



-Conduct outbound calls and messages to potential customers to set appointments



-Consider travel time and routes to ensure efficient daily scheduling



-Record and update appointment details accurately in GoHighLevel (HighLevel) CRM



-Maintain strong communication with clients and the internal team



-Suggest ways to improve scheduling processes and client satisfaction





Requirements



-Proven experience in appointment setting (preferably for in-person services)



-Knowledge of travel time and route optimization



-Excellent English communication skills — both written and verbal



-Highly organized and detail-oriented; able to manage multiple accounts



-Familiarity with HighLevel CRM or similar scheduling software



-Reliable internet connection and quiet home workspace



-Positive, professional, and proactive attitude







Why Join SSP Marketing



At SSP Marketing, we help local businesses grow by managing their appointment scheduling and customer communication. You’ll join a supportive, remote team that values consistency, teamwork, and quality work.



We provide paid training to help you succeed in this role. Pay adjustments may be considered after training based on performance and company needs.



How to Apply



Interested applicants may apply through this link:

title: Administrative Assistant
description:
We are seeking an Administrative Assistant to join our growing team and play a key role in delivering exceptional service and streamlined processes. Through personalized support and innovative job search solutions, we empower professionals to succeed in their careers.



As an integral member of our organization, you’ll collaborate with both clients and internal teams to ensure efficiency, clarity, and a seamless experience. Exceptional written and verbal English communication skills are required for professional client interaction.



This is a fully remote role, working 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST, Mondays through Fridays.



Role Overview

The Administrative Assistant will act as the operational backbone of our client support and internal coordination. You’ll manage communication flows, monitor processes, and contribute to continuous improvement initiatives. This role is perfect for someone who thrives on organization, loves helping others succeed, and brings strong attention to detail.



Key Responsibilities

- Serve as the primary point of contact for client inquiries, ensuring timely and accurate responses.

- Coordinate follow-ups with clients to track progress and satisfaction.

- Collaborate with internal teams to optimize workflows and deliver a seamless client experience.

- Maintain detailed records of client interactions using CRM software.

- Generate reports and documentation related to client feedback, satisfaction, and performance metrics.

- Provide administrative and operational support to internal tea
mbers (e.g., scheduling, correspondence, project assistance).

- Collect and analyze client feedback to inform process improvements and service innovation.

- Assist in responding to inbound service inquiries and help promote our offerings to new prospects.

- Keep internal process guides, SOPs, and documentation up to date for knowledge-sharing.

- Pull and organize key performance indicators (KPIs) on a regular basis to track operational efficiency and support data-driven decision-making.



Requirements

- Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Communications, or related field (or equivalent experience).

- 2+ years of experience in administrative support, customer service, or an operations-focused role.

- Excellent organizational and time-management skills with the ability to meet deadlines.

- Strong verbal and written English communication skills with a friendly, professional tone.

- Experience using CRM systems and digital workflow tools.

- Analytical thinking and attention to detail in handling data and making informed suggestions.

- Comfortable working in a fast-paced, evolving environment.

- Collaborative mindset and a genuine passion for supporting team and client success.

title: Full Time Amazon VA
description:
About Our Company:

We are a family-owned Amazon business based in the US market, and we're looking to grow. We believe in providing a secure, long-term working environment. In this economy, we understand the value of stability, and we want you to have peace of mind knowing you have a reliable and permanent position with us.



The Opportunity:

This is a full-time position for a motivated, self-starter to be a key part of our operations. While the role starts at $500 a month, we are looking for someone who wants to grow with us. As our business expands, your responsibilities and compensation will grow along with it. The sky is the limit for our growth, and we are looking for an ambitious individual who is ready to take on more and build a career, not just have a job.



Key Responsibilities:



1.) Sourcing and Product Research:



Proactively find profitable products for our online arbitrage business using our established criteria and your own initiative.

Research trends and sales to identify new opportunities.



2.) Administrative Tasks:



Handle data entry, ensuring all product and sourcing information is accurate and organized.



Manage and track orders, ensuring timely and correct delivery of inventory.



Maintain detailed records and reports in Google Sheets.



Check for missing inventory: Run the "Reconcile" report for all FBA shipments that were recently closed.



Create a case with Seller Support for any units that Amazon received but have not been added to your inventory.



Track reimbursements: Go to your "Reimbursements" dashboard to ensure all pending cases are being processed. Follow up on any cases that are past the expected resolution time.



How to Apply:

To be considered for this position, please send your resume and a brief cover letter. Additionally, please create a 30-second to 1-minute video introduction of yourself, upload it, and include the link in your reply. Also, please use the following subject line: [INSERT Your Favorite Dish]



3.) General Backend Support:



Provide support for various Amazon Seller Central administrative tasks as needed.



Assist with other administrative duties as required to support our business operations.





We Are Looking For Someone Who Is:



A Self-Starter: You don't wait to be told what to do. You take initiative and are resourceful.



Ambitious and Has a Growth Mindset: You want to learn and take on more responsibility, seeing this role as a stepping stone to a bigger career.



Detail-Oriented: You have an eye for detail and ensure all data is accurate.



Trustworthy: You are reliable and honest.



Strong Communicator: You can communicate clearly and effectively in English + Fast Computer



Must be able to work USA Timezone!



Compensation & Benefits:

-Salary: A stable full-time base salary of $500 per month.

— Opportunity to earn $550 USD / mo after 6 months if performance milestones are met

— Opportunity to earn $600 USD / mo after 12 months is performance milestones are met



-Security: This is a long-term position, providing you with job security you can rely on.



-Growth: Significant room to grow in both responsibility and salary as we grow the business. Career advancement (promotions)



— We also offer quarterly and annual performance-based bonuses

— We honor the tradition of 13th pay

— Stable Career and career advancement (promotions)

title: Recruiter
description:
Our company is on a mission to redefine the way job seekers embark on their next career adventure. As a Reverse Recruiter, you will be at the heart of this transformation. This unique role is designed for someone who wants to make a significant impact on individuals' professional lives, by bridging the gap between talent and opportunity. You'll partner closely with job seekers, diving deep into their professional backgrounds, aspirations, and preferences to proactively identify and secure opportunities that resonate with their career goals. Your expertise will turn the traditional job search process on its head, creating a personalized, supportive journey for each candidate.





Key Responsibilities:

Foster strong relationships with job seekers, becoming their trusted advisor and advocate in the job market.

Leverage your understanding of the candidates’ skills and goals to identify and secure job opportunities that align with their aspirations.

Develop and maintain a dynamic pipeline of eligible job posts for your client.

Assess job postings to ensure they meet the clients criteria and potential for success.

Act as the primary point of contact for clients, offering guidance and answering questions throughout their job search journey.

Achieve daily targets relating to job postings and applications processed.



Qualifications:

A Bachelor's degree or higher is preferred, showcasing your commitment to learning and professional development.

Exceptional proficiency in English, with the ability to convey complex ideas.

Outstanding organizational skills, with a knack for juggling multiple priorities seamlessly.

Innate interpersonal abilities, with a genuine passion for connecting with and supporting others.

Proficiency in Microsoft Office suite, demonstrating your ability to navigate and utilize software to enhance productivity.

A track record of meeting and exceeding quotas, showing your dedication to achieving goals.

At least 2 years of experience in recruiting, indicating your understanding of the job market and talent acquisition strategies.

title: Fitness Virtual Assistant (Male Only)

title: Social media co ordinator
description:
Job Outline:

About the Role

We are seeking a highly driven and resourceful Digital Marketing Coordinator - Part-time to help build buzz and drive ticket sales for live performance events across Australia for our show called Sydney Hotshots- its a magic mike style show fully choreographed designed mainly for women. 

This is a hands-on role focused on executing creative, high-impact marketing campaigns at both a digital and grassroots level. You will play a key role in ensuring every show reaches the right audience and achieves strong attendance.



Key Responsibilities

1. Social Media & Content Execution

Plan, develop, and schedule high-quality, engaging content across key platforms, primarily
 and Instagram

Write compelling captions and calls-to-action designed to drive engagement and ticket conversions

Ensure consistent and timely promotion of upcoming shows, announcements, and updates

Monitor content performance and optimise posts using insights, analytics, and tools such as Meta AI

Maintain brand voice and visual consistency across all social media channels

2. Community & Grassroots Marketing

Identify, join, and actively engage with relevant local
 groups, forums, and community pages

Promote events organically within local networks to build awareness and drive ticket sales

Develop grassroots marketing strategies tailored to each tour location

Foster relationships with local communities to create repeat engagement and word-of-mouth promotion

3. Event & Campaign Planning

Manage and maintain forward marketing calendars aligned with national and regional tour schedules

Plan and execute multi-channel marketing campaigns leading up to each event

Ensure all campaigns are delivered on time and aligned with overall marketing objectives

Track campaign performance and recommend improvements for future events

4. Venue & Partner Collaboration

Liaise with venues, promoters, and partners to align on marketing strategies and promotional timelines

Coordinate and execute collaborative (“collab”) social media posts and cross-promotions

Ensure all partners are provided with the necessary marketing assets and information

Maintain strong working relationships with key stakeholders

5. Influencer & Media Outreach

Research, identify, and engage relevant local influencers and content creators to support promotions

Build and maintain relationships with influencers for ongoing collaborations

Reach out to local media outlets (radio, online publications, community boards) for coverage opportunities

Assist in coordinating press releases, interviews, and promotional features

6. Reporting & Performance Tracking (added)

Monitor and report on campaign performance, including reach, engagement, and ticket conversions

Use data insights to refine strategies and improve future campaign outcomes

Provide regular updates to stakeholders on marketing effectiveness



Qualifications

Proven experience 3+ years in social media marketing, digital marketing, event marketing, or promotions

Strong understanding of
 (Meta) and Instagram platforms, including organic and paid strategies

Highly proactive, organised, and resourceful — able to work independently with minimal supervision

Strong written and verbal communication skills

Ability to manage multiple campaigns and deadlines simultaneously

Comfortable working in a fast-paced, collaborative team environment

Experience using CRM systems and marketing tools



Preferred Skills (Nice to Have)

Experience with Eventbrite or similar ticketing platforms

Basic knowledge of paid social advertising (Meta Ads)

Familiarity with content creation tools (e.g., Canva, Adobe Suite)

Experience with
 marketing platforms (e.g., Mailchimp, Klaviyo)

Understanding of analytics tools (Meta Insights, Google Analytics, etc.)







Working Schedule and Work Setup

Australian business hours - Part-time role (approx. 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM AEST - may change from time to time according to groups traveling across Australia).

Remote / Work-from-home setup

Flexible arrangements may be considered based on performance and business needs

Must have a stable internet connection and a suitable home office setup

Possibility to move to Full-time within few months

title: Real Estate VA | Full Time | Remote | Welcoming Entry Level Individuals

Click on link and click on Apply Now : 





JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

• Follow company-provided cold calling scripts

Lead Handoff

Daily Performance Tracking

– Calls made

– Conversations

– Leads generated





IDEAL CANDIDATE PROFILE



• Strong spoken English (clear and confident on the phone)

• Comfortable making outbound cold calls

• Able to follow scripts and instructions precisely

• Organized, reliable, and detail-oriented

• Coachable and open to feedback

• Tech-savvy or willing to learn quickly

• Full-time availability (no other jobs or side work)





TOOLS YOU’LL BE USING



• Mighty Call (dialer + lead notes)

• Company-provided call scripts

• Simple tracking sheets (if needed)





JOB DETAILS



• Schedule: Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 6:30 PM EST

• Type: Full-Time, Remote

• Pay: Base salary + performance bonuses

• Start Date: ASAP

title: Founder’s Associate / Growth and Operations VA
description:

This role starts part-time and can grow into full-time for the right person.



We build SaaS products, work on WordPress websites, support clients, and are always working on new ideas. I am looking for someone who can help keep things moving, take work off my plate, think independently, and become a trusted right-hand person over time.





This is not a basic VA role. I need someone who is comfortable with technology, communicates well, follows through, and can handle a mix of operations, outreach, coordination, and support.





What you’ll help with

- Checking work and helping make sure projects stay on track

- Checking in with clients and helping with follow-up communication

- Helping with lead generation and outreach

- Supporting SaaS products we are building

- Testing features and workflows inside apps and giving clear feedback

- Engaging with customers and helping with communication

- Assisting with WordPress updates and general website-related tasks

- Helping coordinate delegation and project hiring when needed

- Researching tools, trends, and opportunities

- Acting as a sounding board for ideas and helping bring structure to them





What I’m looking for

- Self-directed and independent

- Highly organized

- Strong written English

- Comfortable learning new tools and systems

- Good at following through and keeping things moving

- Detail-oriented

- Tech-comfortable

- Able to communicate professionally with clients and customers

- Comfortable wearing multiple hats in a growing business





Big plus if you have experience with

- WordPress

- Lead generation or outreach

- Customer support or client communication

- SaaS tools or software products

- QA testing / bug reporting

- Hiring or coordinating freelancers/contractors

- Working directly with a founder or small team





About the role



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys variety, likes solving problems, and wants to grow with a business. If you do well, this can become a long-term full-time opportunity with increasing responsibility.



I am focused on building and launching products. I want someone who can help support execution, communication, follow-up, coordination, and day-to-day 
ntum.



Pay

- Part-time to start

- $4–6/hour depending on experience and fit

- Opportunity to grow into full-time





To apply

title: Online Advertising Expert - B2B and Technology (Contract or Permanent)
description:
Summary

About the Role

We're looking for an experienced online advertising expert to run paid campaigns on **LinkedIn** and **Google Ads** for B2B technology clients. This could be a contract engagement (a few months) or a permanent role depending on fit.



What You'll Do

- Plan, execute, and optimize paid LinkedIn ad campaigns (Sponsored Content, Lead Gen Forms, InMail, etc.)

- Plan, execute, and optimize Google Ads campaigns (Search, Display, Performance Max, YouTube, etc.)

- Manage ad budgets and deliver measurable ROI

- Report on campaign performance with clear, data-driven insights

- Collaborate with internal teams on targeting, messaging, and creative



Requirements

title: Cold Caller / Appointment Setter (SDR) – Commercial Cleaning
description:
You must have experienced in appointment setter/ cold calling and experience in go high level. 

We are commercial cleaning company is looking for a Cold Caller / Appointment Setter (SDR) to call lead lists into qualified walkthrough appointments for the sales team.



This is a long-term role for someone who is confident on the phone, organized in a CRM, and hungry to earn more based on performance.



Responsibilities



Daily Calling & Outreach

 • Make outbound calls to businesses from provided lead lists and CRM

 • Follow a clear script to:

 • Introduce the company and services

 • Ask qualifying questions (type of facility, size, cleaning frequency, current provider, contract timing)

 • Identify pain points with their current cleaning solution

 • Book walkthrough appointments for the sales/operations team

 • Send follow-up
s and SMS through the CRM to confirm and remind appointments

 • Handle light objections and keep conversations professional, friendly, and confident



CRM & Pipeline Management

 • Work from the CRM (e.g., GoHighLevel or similar) – no loose spreadsheets

 • Update lead status after every call (New, Contacted, Qualified, Walkthrough Set, Not Interested, etc.)

 • Add clear notes so the sales team knows what was discussed

 • Tag and mark leads that are not a fit (too small, residential only, wrong contact, etc.)

 • Schedule follow-ups for “call back later,” “renewing soon,” and other warm opportunities



Reporting & Communication

 • Attend short weekly check-ins via Zoom with the team

 • Send simple daily reports:

 • Number of calls made

 • Number of conversations

 • Number of qualified appointments booked and confirmed

 • Feedback on common objections or patterns you’re hearing

 • Suggest script or process improvements based on real conversations





Ideal Candidate

 • Strong spoken English – clear, confident, and easy to understand

 • Previous experience in:

 • B2B cold calling, and/or

 • Appointment setting, and/or

 • SDR/inside sales for service-based businesses (cleaning, home services, marketing, real estate, etc.)

 • Comfortable making 60–80 outbound calls per day

 • Able to follow a script AND adjust naturally in conversation

 • Familiar with any CRM (GoHighLevel, HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.) – willing to learn a new one if needed

 • Organized and disciplined: updates notes and statuses in real time

 • Thick-skinned and positive: not afraid of “no” and keeps going





What Success Looks Like



You are successful in this role if you consistently:

 • Hit 60–80 dials per day

 • Book 12–20 qualified walkthrough appointments per month

 • Keep no-show rates low by confirming and reminding prospects

 • Maintain clean, accurate records in the CRM so the team always knows:

 • Who has been contacted

 • Who is interested

 • Who is not a fit and why





Schedule

 • 40 hours per week (can start part-time and increase if it’s a good fit)

 • Must be able to work during U.S. business hours (Eastern Time overlap) for calling windows





Compensation



This role is paid with a mix of base + performance:

 • Base Pay: $640/month

 • Bonus: $20 for each qualified appointment that actually holds (not just booked)

 • Commission: 5% of the first month’s contract value on any contract over $2,500/month that comes from your appointments



If you perform well, your earnings can grow quickly month over month.





How to Apply



Please include:

 1. A short note about your cold calling or appointment setting experience

 2. A brief audio or Loom/video sample (1–2 minutes) of you introducing yourself as if you were calling a facility manager about commercial cleaning services

 3. Your availability (hours per week and time zone)

EST time zone required

title: POS Implementation and Onboarding Specialist
description:
Onboarding & Implementation Specialist (Mention “Plum Clock” in your response)



Company Overview:



Trusted by major players throughout the industry, Altametrics has been designing and deploying infrastructure solutions renowned as best-of-breed in performance since 1997. The company philosophy is to combine software design with comprehensive consultancy and support services for business-critical applications.



Our enterprise software solutions help businesses increase productivity, improve profitability, enhance customer service, integrate seamlessly with other systems, and empower executives with real-time access to data for informed decision-making.



Altametrics offers a full suite of enterprise software and professional services tailored to the needs of multiple departments and executive management. Our web-based, scalable, and reliable solutions are backed by industry-leading consulting, training, and support.



We provide a friendly, energetic, and fast-paced environment filled with new challenges, opportunities for growth, and a team that thrives on collaboration.



Position: Onboarding & Implementation Specialist

Location: Remote (U.S.-based)

Hours: 8:00 AM – 4:30 PM Pacific Standard Time



Position Summary:



As an Onboarding & Implementation Specialist, you’ll play a hybrid role that blends customer support with technical onboarding for our Point-of-Sale (POS) and enterprise solutions. You will ensure that new clients are successfully introduced to our system and feel confident navigating our tools. This position requires experience in building menus within POS platforms, strong communication skills, accurate data entry, and the ability to support customers with professionalism and care.



Key Responsibilities:

- Execute onboarding strategies aligned with company and client objectives

- Configure and customize POS systems, including menu-building based on client requirements

- Accurately handle client data entry and system configuration

- Deliver clear, friendly verbal support and training to customers

- Troubleshoot client issues and collaborate with internal/external teams to resolve them efficiently

- Provide ongoing external support for both technical POS concerns and general customer service needs

- Adapt to a shifting work schedule as needed



Required Skills & Experience:

- 2–4 years in a customer-facing role (Onboarding, Implementation, Support, or CSR)

- Prior experience building menus within POS platforms (e.g., restaurant tech or POS systems)

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills

- Strong attention to detail and experience in high-accuracy data entry

- Proven ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines

- Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and Word

- Self-motivated and tech-savvy with a client-focused approach



Tech Requirements:

- Personal computer (PC or laptop)

- Reliable and stable internet connection (with a backup source)

- Functional webcam

- Working microphone (integrated or external)



Important Note:

When responding to this job posting, please include the phrase “Plum Clock” in the subject line of your
 or application.

title: Amazon Seller Central Account Coordinator
description:
Here’s a quick video sharing why you may want to work with me! 
 



Role Overview:

I’m looking for an exceptional, detail-oriented Account Coordinator to join my equally amazing team. In this role, you’ll be a key member of a cross-functional team, helping ensure the smooth execution of Amazon-related projects that directly support our clients’ success. You’ll collaborate closely with both our overseas point of contact and our U.S.-based manager, providing reliable support while taking full ownership of your responsibilities.



Requirements:

*Must be able to work 20 hours weekly, with the potential to go full-time in the future

*Must be able to work any 4-hour block between 9 AM to 5 PM Mountain Time (US)

*Must have strong written and verbal communication

*Highly organized, detail-oriented, proactive, and able to manage multiple priorities independently

*Must have 1-2 years of experience working with Amazon Seller Central

*Experience in a start-up or other fast-paced, high-growth company is a plus.

*Must have strong problem-solving skills and must be a creative thinker with demonstrated initiative.

*Must have the ability to identify root causes and effectively communicate complex issues cross-functionally.

*Must be able to work autonomously, and manage tasks and timelines efficiently with minimal oversight.

*Must have the ability to accurately execute operating procedures and best practices as defined by the company



What You’ll Do:



Must-Have Experience (Responsibilities You Must Be Proficient In)



These are the tasks the VA needs to handle independently and confidently from day one:



Account Health and Compliance: 

*Monitor the health, account status and listings of client Amazon Seller Central and Vendor Central accounts to ensure optimal performance.

*Conduct root cause analysis for errors and issues as they arise and communicate them effectively across departments

*Manage case logs for listing, inventory, and account health-related issues, providing timely resolution and support.

*Perform regular checks and updates to ensure compliance with Amazon policies and guidelines.

*Communicate with Amazon Seller Support via chat,
, or phone to resolve any issues.

*Monitor product reviews and ratings, proactively escalating low ratings or trends to Account Managers for action

*Maintain and regularly update the Voice of the Customer (VOTC) tracker to monitor product performance insights.



Catalog and Listing Management:

*Assist in maintaining and updating the brand catalog in Seller and Vendor Central using flat files and bulk uploads in Microsoft Excel.

*Optimize product detail pages through content updates and ensure catalog accuracy.

*Manage product listings, from creation to troubleshooting, using flat files and Microsoft Excel

*Upload and manage listing visuals, including A+ Content and thumbnail images, ensuring brand consistency and accuracy

*Write optimized product titles, bullet points, and other copywriting tasks to ensure engaging, high-converting content.



Promotions Support:

*Create and track promotional efforts

*Enroll products in the Subscribe & Save or Vine programs as needed.

*Create weekly Brand Posts, including image editing in Canva (or other similar tools) and craft compelling copy for each post across multiple brands.



Data Collection, Reporting, and Team Collaboration:

*Prepare monthly Virtual Bundles performance reports and support quarterly business recaps.

*Assist with data collection, analysis, and reporting to support Account Managers in achieving client objectives

*Use Microsoft Office and Google Suite for collaboration

*Collaborate with 3P support and the account manager overseeing Luminary brands through
 correspondence.



Nice-to-Have Experience (Responsibilities You Can Learn Over Time)



These tasks are valuable but can be trained on the job:



Executive Support:

*Collaborate with the US-based Account Management team through Slack and Asana

*Continuously learn and stay updated with Amazon's platform changes, policies, and industry trends.

*Use Helium 10 for keyword research



Ready to Apply?

1. Message me with the subject “I'm excited to work with you, Jessica!”

2. Add a link to your resume

3. Indicate your contact
 address



If this doesn’t sound perfect but you love hard work and learning, reach out anyway—there’s likely another chance to join my team!

title: Executive Assistant to CEO
description:
Overview:



We are seeking a highly capable, proactive Executive Assistant to directly support the CEO. This is a high-impact role for someone who thrives in fast-paced environments, operates with an owner’s mindset, and is passionate about contributing to meaningful work—particularly within education, schools, and mission-driven organizations. This individual will serve as a strategic partner to the CEO, helping to streamline operations, manage communications, and create leverage across the business. 



Location Requirement:

This role ideally supports a Pacific Time (PT) schedule, or candidates must be willing and able to work within Pacific Time business hours.



Key Responsibilities

1. CEO Calendar & Schedule Management

* Own and optimize the CEO’s calendar with precision and foresight

* Coordinate meetings, appointments, and priorities across multiple stakeholders

* Anticipate scheduling conflicts and proactively resolve them

* Ensure the CEO is prepared for all meetings with relevant materials and context



2.
 & Communication Management

* Manage and organize the CEO’s inbox with a focus on efficiency and clarity

* Draft, respond to, and prioritize
s on behalf of the CEO

* Identify urgent vs. non-urgent communications and take action accordingly

* Maintain a high standard of written communication aligned with the brand



3. Research & Strategic Support

* Conduct research on clients, prospects, media opportunities, and industry trends

* Compile insights and summaries to support decision-making

title: REMOTE MEDIA BUYER (Performance Marketing | Legal Niche)
description:
Most “media buyers” can launch ads.



Very few can actually scale them profitably.



We’re looking for the second type.



We run performance-driven campaigns for law firms across the U.S. Everything we do is focused on one thing:

Generating signed cases.



Not clicks. Not impressions. Not vanity metrics.



If you’ve never been responsible for real performance, this won’t be a fit.



What You’ll Be Responsible For:



• Managing and optimizing paid campaigns across Meta, TikTok, YouTube, and more

• Turning cold traffic into qualified case inquiries and live transfers

• Monitoring performance daily and making fast, data-driven decisions

• Scaling what works while controlling cost per lead and cost per case

• Working closely with our team to improve creatives, funnels, and results



What We Actually Care About (Non-Negotiables):



• Proven experience managing paid ad campaigns with measurable results

• You understand CPL, CPA, and how to consistently improve them

• You know how to cut losing campaigns quickly and scale winners

• Strong verbal and written English

• Ability to work within CST hours



Bonus Points If You:



• Have experience in lead generation (especially legal)

• Have managed higher budget campaigns ($20K+/month)

• Understand landing pages, funnels, and conversion tracking



What You Get:



• Competitive salary based on experience

• Clear growth based on performance

• Fully remote role

• A team that actually knows what they’re doing



Final Note:



We’re not looking for beginners.



We’re looking for someone who has been in the trenches, made real decisions with real budgets, and knows how to win.



If that’s you, apply.

title: CEO Executive Admin Assistant
description:
ABOUT SHOP MARKETING PROS:

We are a marketing agency based in the United States with a stateside and international team of over 50 professionals. Shop Marketing Pros is a very well-respected and rapidly growing Digital Marketing Company in the Automotive Repair Industry with strong core values and a superb track record of serving its clients. Our key services include Website Design, Digital Advertising, Search Engine Optimization, and Social Media Management. 



Our Core Values are of incredible importance to us. We live by our “SHIELD,” so please visit 
/core-values/ and familiarize yourself with our Core Values before continuing. Please continue with this job description and application if you feel you align with these values.



JOB DESCRIPTION:

Shop Marketing Pros is seeking a highly capable Executive Admin Assistant to directly support our CEO and Visionary leader. This role exists for a specific purpose: to make the CEO’s life more efficient by protecting his time, reducing distractions, organizing priorities, and ensuring important details are addressed.



The ideal candidate thrives in fast-moving environments, communicates confidently, stays calm under pressure, and is not intimidated by strong leadership. This person moves quickly, thinks big, maintains structure, communicates boldly, and acts as a strategic gatekeeper - keeping the CEO focused and his 
ntum aligned with key priorities.





REQUIRED SKILLS:

The perfect candidate has 

Exceptional written and verbal English communication

Advanced inbox management with strong judgment and professionalism

Excellent calendar management and scheduling coordination: meeting gatekeeping

Strong organizational systems and follow-through habits

The ability to prioritize tasks in a fast-paced environment 

Exceptional capability to handle direct communication professionally

The confidence to challenge ideas respectfully when needed

High level of discretion when dealing with confidential business and personal information

Strong initiative; identifies problems and solves them proactively

Extensive background in using Google Workspace and project management tools



Not Required, but helpful:

Previous executive administrative assistance experience is preferred

Previous experience working in an agency





JOB RESPONSIBILITIES:

Manage the CEO’s inbox with precision: triage, respond, organize, and flag only what truly needs attention

Maintain and protect the CEO’s calendar, preventing unnecessary meetings and distractions

Coordinate scheduling, rescheduling, confirmations, and meeting prep

Serve as a gatekeeper for requests, vendors, and unnecessary demands on the CEO’s time

Follow through on delegated tasks to ensure nothing gets dropped

Help the CEO stay focused, organized, and on track with priorities

Provide reminders, accountability, and structured follow-up

Communicate on behalf of the CEO professionally and confidently

Challenges misalignment in commitments, priorities, or scheduling with clarity and professionalism

Continuously identify opportunities to delegate tasks away from the CEO

Establish structure, clarity, and consistency to support a fast-paced, high-performing environment.





MORE INFO + BENEFITS + PERKS:

1. This is a full-time, permanent, remote position from 8 am to 4 pm Central Time

2. 13th Month Pay

3. Unlimited PTO (after 3 months of employment) *CEO Admin Assistant should be reliable, and not overuse PTO*

4. 8 Paid Holiday Leaves

5. Paid time off beginning Christmas Eve until New Year’s Day *CEO Admin Assistant will need to be available, as needed, during this time*

6. An extraordinary team/company culture





INSTRUCTIONS FOR APPLICATION:

2. Record a Loom video discussing the points in this job description and why you would be the perfect Admin Assistant for Brian Walker, CEO & Founder of Shop Marketing Pros

3. In your cover letter, mention which of our core values resonates with you the most.

4. Include a link to your resume.

5. Use at least 7 Apply Points to qualify for this job.

6. DO NOT
 me.

title: AI Automation Systems Specialist — Day Shift Only · No Graveyard ·
description:
About Zelix Labs

We're a specialised AI and messaging automation agency. We build stable, well-governed automation systems for businesses — using GoHighLevel, 
, 
, and n8n as our core stack.

This is not a volume shop. Not a generic VA setup. We build serious systems and we need serious people to help run them.



Why This Role Is Different

Let's get the important stuff out of the way first.

1) No graveyard shifts. 

You work day shift, Philippine time. Your evenings are yours. Your sleep is yours. Your weekends are yours. We're not going to ask you to wreck your body clock to serve a timezone that isn't yours.



2) Fully remote, work from home.

No commute. No office politics. No dress code. You work from wherever you're comfortable and you're judged entirely on the quality of your work.



3) This is a long-term seat, not a project gig.

We're not hiring you to finish a sprint and disappear. We're building a team. As the systems grow, your salary and scope grow with them. We'd rather invest in someone who stays than churn through people who leave.



4) You'll work with tools most people haven't touched yet.

LLM conversation agents, RAG architectures, multi-platform workflow systems — the kind of AI automation that most people in the industry are still figuring out. If you're the kind of person who reads the docs, pokes at the API, and wants to understand what's actually happening under the hood — this is your seat.



5) Structured onboarding. Real SOPs. Not thrown in the deep end.

You'll have documentation, training, and a clear process from day one. We don't do "figure it out" onboarding.



What You'll Be Doing

You'll be the person keeping client automation systems running well and building them right. That means:

- Setting up and configuring GoHighLevel (GHL), 
, and AI conversation agents

- Implementing workflow changes based on documented instructions — and flagging when the instructions need improving

- Building and maintaining n8n and 
 automations, including webhook layers, HTTP modules, and API integrations

- Reviewing live setups and catching issues before they become i

- Monitoring automations and handling i
 calmly when something breaks — triage, containment, escalation, clean write-up

- Writing i
 summaries, change logs, and internal documentation that other people can actually follow

- Working with AI-enhanced automation layers where applicable — LLM agents, conversation flows, context-aware routing

- Communicating directly with clients — translating what's happening in their systems into plain language, setting expectations during i
, and keeping them informed without over-promising



This is not a sales role and you won't be managing live chat queues. But you will be client-facing on the technical side. That means being someone clients can trust — clear, calm, and precise, even when the system is on fire.



What We're Looking For

We care more about how you think — and what you've actually built — than how many years you've been doing this.

You're the right fit if you:

- Approach broken systems the same way every time: isolate, contain, fix, document

- Write clearly in English — your i
 summaries and change logs should be readable by someone who wasn't there

- Take ownership without waiting to be told, and escalate clearly when something is outside your scope

- Are comfortable saying "I don't know yet — here's what I'm checking" — to us and to clients

- Can communicate technical updates to non-technical people without dumbing it down or talking in circles

- Have a portfolio or case studies that show real builds, not just a list of tools you've used

- Come from a technical background — DevOps, SRE, QA, or similar — and have layered automation on top of it



Required:

- Strong written English — both internal documentation and client-facing communication

- Logical, structured problem-solver who can follow and improve SOPs

- Genuine interest in AI agents, LLM-powered systems, and automation architecture

- Comfortable being the direct point of contact for clients on technical matters



Strong advantage:

- GoHighLevel experience — Admin Certified is a plus

- Hands-on experience with Conversation AI inside GHL

- Hands-on with 
 — building flows, not just reading about it

- 
 or n8n — ideally both, and ideally with real client builds behind you

- Comfort working directly with APIs, webhooks, and JSON payloads

- Background in DevOps, SRE, tech support, or QA

- Experience with AI/LLM integrations — agents, RAG pipelines, prompt engineering





What This Role Is Not

- Not sales

- Not a call centre or live chat job

- Not repetitive copy-paste work



Every day involves judgment calls. You'll be trusted to act on them.



Compensation & Details

- PHP 20,000 – 48,000 depending on experience

- Day shift, Philippine time — no graveyard shifts, no odd hours

- Fully remote, work from home

- Long-term role — salary and scope grow as you do

- Structured onboarding with SOPs and training from day one



How to Apply

Send us two things:

- Your CV

- A short written answer to this question: "Describe a time an automation you built or managed broke in production. What happened, how did you handle it, and what did you change afterward?"

- A Loom walkthrough of a build you're proud of — walk us through what it does, why you built it that way, and what you'd improve if you rebuilt it today.



We're not looking for the perfect answer. We're looking at how you think.



Hiring Timeline

Role is immediate. We are currently recruiting. Shortlisted candidates will be notified promptly. Onboarding begins once the right person is confirmed — we move quickly for the right fit.

title: API Developer & Systems Integrator
description:
About the Role 

We are seeking a skilled API Developer & Systems Integrator to join our team. In this role, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining the critical connections between our core software platforms. You will bridge the gap between disparate systems—from CRMs and property management systems (PMS) to modern AI and automation tools—ensuring seamless data flow and operational efficiency. 



The ideal candidate is proficient in modern programming languages, has a strong grasp of database architecture, and possesses a passion for leveraging low-code automation platforms and cutting-edge AI technologies to solve complex business challenges.





Key Responsibilities



- API Development & Management: Design, build, and maintain scalable RESTful APIs and webhooks to facilitate communication between internal and external systems. 

- Systems Integration: Lead integration projects with third-party platforms, including CRMs, PMS solutions, and communication tools (Twilio, Vonage). 

- Automation & Workflow: Develop and maintain automated workflows using platforms like n8n, Make, Zapier, and the Microsoft Power Platform (Power Automate, Power Apps) to streamline business processes. 

- Data Engineering & Reporting: Write complex SQL queries to extract, transform, and load (ETL) data. Build and maintain interactive dashboards and reports in Power BI to provide stakeholders with actionable insights. 

- Cloud & Infrastructure: Utilize Microsoft Azure services (including Azure Functions, Logic Apps, and App Services) to deploy and manage integration solutions. Leverage Microsoft Fabric for data integration and analytics where applicable. 

- AI & LLM Integration: Experiment with and implement solutions utilizing Large Language Models (LLMs) by integrating with OpenAI API, Azure AI, and other voice AI platforms (VAPI). 

- Code Maintenance: Write clean, maintainable code in Python or JavaScript/Node.js to support custom integration logic that goes beyond low-code capabilities.





Required Skills & Qualifications 



- Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or equivalent practical experience. 

- Programming: Proficiency in at least one modern language: Python or JavaScript/Node.js. 

- Database: Strong working knowledge of SQL for querying, data manipulation, and performance optimization. 

- Cloud: Hands-on experience with Microsoft Azure services (Functions, Logic Apps, Storage). 

- Reporting: Proven experience building reports and dashboards in Power BI. 

- Integration Logic: Deep understanding of webhooks, event-driven architecture, and API security protocols (OAuth, API Keys).





Preferred Experience 



- Automation Platforms: Experience building workflows with n8n, Zapier, Make (Integromat). 

- Microsoft Stack: Proficiency with the Microsoft Power Platform (Power Automate/Flow, Power Apps) and Microsoft Fabric. 

- AI & Voice: Experience integrating with Voice AI platforms (VAPI, Twilio, Vonage) or AI/LLM APIs (OpenAI, Azure AI). 

- Domain Expertise: Previous experience integrating with Property Management Systems (PMS) or CRM platforms (e.g., Salesforce, HubSpot, Dynamics 365). 

- Azure Advanced: Experience developing with Azure Apps and navigating the Microsoft Fabric ecosystem.





Benefits:



- Competitive salary and performance-based incentives.

- Complete PC package

- Comprehensive benefits package, including health and life insurance.

- Flexible work environment with the option to work remotely.

- Opportunities for professional growth and development.

- Collaborative and supportive team culture



To apply, please include the link of your CV.

title: Customer Collections Team Lead (BNPL)
description:
If you've built your career in collections, know the fintech or BNPL space, and are ready to take that next step into leading a team of your own , Apply here: 



About Us

We are a fast-growing fintech team delivering flexible payment solutions, including Buy Now, Pay Later (BNPL) services, that help customers manage their everyday payments with ease. Our team thrives on collaboration, innovation, and a customer-first mindset. If you're looking for a role where your work genuinely matters and your growth is part of the plan, you've found it.



What You’ll Do

As a Customer Collections Team Lead, you'll be the go-to person for our customers, helping them with payments, resolving account issues, and keeping things on track. AI drives a large part of how we work, but your judgment is what makes it effective. You'll be responsible for feeding it the right context, reviewing outputs before they reach customers, and stepping in when something needs a human call. We move fast and hold each other to a high standard, so you'll be expected to bring your best every day, take feedback in stride, and keep moving forward . 



IMPORTANT: Please carefully read the responsibilities below to ensure you're a good fit, and follow the instructions on how to apply at the bottom.



Core Responsibilities

* Deliver exceptional multi-channel support (chat,
, and phone) with a focus on first-contact resolution and high customer satisfaction.

* Uphold brand standards by communicating clearly, consistently, and professionally in all interactions.

* Actively manage brand reputation by professionally responding to all customer reviews and public feedback.

* Handle and resolve customer complaints with empathy and efficiency, knowing when and how to appropriately escalate complex issues.

* Oversee customer repayments and collections by assisting with payment management, rescheduling, and account oversight with professionalism and care.

* Protect the business by proactively identifying, investigating, and escalating suspicious activity and potential fraud cases.

* Work extensively with AI-driven tools as a core part of your daily workflow. This is a very AI-forward role, so genuine comfort and curiosity with AI is a must.

* Build a real understanding of our processes, not just rely on AI outputs. Speed matters, but so does knowing the reasoning behind what you're doing.

* As the team grows, take on increasing ownership of the Collections function, leading agents, refining SOPs, improving recovery processes, and working closely with Customer Service Operations to keep both teams aligned and running smoothly.



Working Hours:

* Shift during onboarding 11am - 6pm UK time, Monday to Friday. After onboarding a fixed schedule will be provided depending on business needs.

* Must be willing to work during weekends

* This is a full time role only (40 hours per week)



Compensation:

* Competitive salary: $1,300 – $1,500 USD per month (depending on experience)

* Opportunity to grow into a Manager position (with a raise) as the support team expands.



Benefits:

* 100% Remote - work from anywhere in the Philippines.

* 15 days paid leave

* Semi monthy salary payouts

* Paid time off and Philippine public holidays

* Supportive, startup-style culture where your ideas matter

* Clear growth path and strong learning opportunities in fintech



You’re Perfect for This Role If You

* Have proven experience in collections, customer service, ideally within fintech, payments, or  lending (BNPL experience a plus).

* Understand collections, repayments, and fraud detection, and can balance speed with accuracy under pressure.

* Welcome honest, direct feedback and see it as a tool for getting better, not something to take personally.

* Hold yourself to a high standard of integrity. This role gives you immediate access to sensitive financial data, and trust is non-negotiable.

* Are proficient with AI tools and a quick learner when it comes to automation and new tech. 

* Thrive in a fast-paced, customer-first startup environment where priorities shift quickly.

* Are an empathetic problem solver with strong attention to detail, professionalism, and integrity.



How to Apply:

* Click the link below to submit your application and let's get started:

title: Media Buyer for 8-figure brand
description:
Media Buyer Purpose



The purpose of the Media Buyer role at BECH & YD ECOM is first & foremost to be rock-solid in managing the day-to-day of ad accounts & making data-based decisions that drive revenue for our Shopify brands.



As a media buyer, you take pride in doing all the little things correctly & have evidence to prove your reliability & trustworthiness. Managing tens of thousands of dollars per month of someone else’s capital means it is your duty to pay immense attention to detail with every action you take.



You are also on the front lines of all things data for clients. This means you as the Media Buyer need to be accountable & take the initiative in analyzing, interpreting, and reporting that data with the team in order for all of us to make more informed & better decisions, faster.



Your active purpose at BECH & YD ECOM is to work alongside our Strategist & Creative Team to manage & move quickly in ad accounts to get ads live, follow our media buying systems & frameworks to make smart decisions, and analyze & report data to ensure we are hitting our goals month over month.



Media Buyer Primary Roles 



Onboarding:

Performing quality checks on Meta Business Managers

Doing research to find the top-performing ads

Learning and embracing the BECH & YD ECO
dia buying structure



Ongoing:

Create & set dynamic creative tests weekly following the guidance of the creative team

Understand KPIs to scale budgets up & down following the BECH & YD ECOM Scaling Process

Attend weekly team calls to communicate directly with the creative team & strategist on ad account performance

Complete weekly & monthly data reports

Leverage attribution tools & senior strategists for smart decision-making 

Communicate with the team daily on performance

Share any ad concepts or ideas based on data interpretation

Download and upload organic content from social platforms



Qualifications & Character Traits 



Direct Experience Qualifications

Setting up & launching Meta ads for Shopify business

Managing ad accounts spending above $1000 per day

Setting up & troubleshooting tracking for Meta Ads

Analyzing data & providing reports to a team

Working in a team environment & understanding individual roles



CHARACTER TRAITS

Excruciating level of attention to detail with all responsibilities

Moves quickly & is easily accessible 

Extremely well organized, punctual & able to keep order amidst chaos.

Time-efficient with tasks but willing to spend extra time to make things right

Ability to interpret & communicate data effectively with a team

Accountable & reliable person inside of the ad account & outside

Communicates effectively with the team & shares ideas

Coachable & desire to grow their skill set & personal traits





This is NOT For You If: 

You do not pay close attention to detail

You don’t have experience running Meta ads

You are a slow mover

You are not a good communicator 

You don’t like a high-operating environment

You are unorganized

You are not a team player 

You don’t understand eCommerce

You are not passionate about growth 



Compensation



• Starting salary: $5 per hour + Performance-Based Bonuses

• Work week: 6 days a week



Growth Potential 



At BECH & YD ECOM, we highly value growth and development in all areas. With great performance, the potential for you as a Media Buyer is significant.



Important Application Requirement



To qualify for this role, you must submit a Loom video (2–3 minutes) as part of your application. Please briefly introduce yourself, explain why you’re a strong fit for the Media Buyer position, and share one specific example of how you’ve successfully managed and scaled Meta ad accounts.



Applications submitted without a Loom video will not be considered.

title: $1,500 Potential | Meta Ad Creative Content Creator (Performance Focused)
description:
JOB OVERVIEW

Are you a master of the "Scroll Stop"? Do you understand why a certain hook works while others fail?



Helping Hands Financials is a growth-focused financial services company. We aren't just running ads; we are building a high-scale advertising engine. We are looking for a Performance-Driven Content Creator who can bridge the gap between creative storytelling and data-driven results.



In this role, your success isn't measured by "likes"—it’s measured by appointments generated. If you love the challenge of lowering CPAs and testing new angles, this is for you.



COMPENSATION & BONUSES (Paid in USD)

We believe in rewarding the people who drive our growth.



Base Salary: $900/month (First 90 days)



Regular Salary: $1,000/month (After 90 days)



Monthly Performance Bonus (CPA-Based):



Under $90 CPA = +$500 Bonus



$90–$100 CPA = +$400 Bonus



$100–$110 CPA = +$300 Bonus



(Basically: The better your ads perform, the more you make!)



WHAT YOU WILL DO

Creative Production: Develop static ad designs and briefs for leadership to record.

WORK SETUP & PERKS



Remote-First: Work from home with high autonomy.



Benefits: 10 PTO days + Paid U.S. Holidays.



Bonuses: $300 Quarterly Performance Bonus (after probation).



Growth: Annual $50/month salary increases starting Year 2.



REQUIREMENTS



Proven experience in Meta 
/Instagram) advertising.



The ability to write scripts that sell (Direct-Response Marketing).



A "pioneer" mindset—we are a fast-moving team that values execution over activity.



Reliable internet and a laptop capable of content creation.



HOW TO APPLY (IMPORTANT)

To ensure you have high attention to detail, please include the exact message below in your application:



“I have read and understand the details and would like to submit my resume for consideration.”

title: Talent Sourcer for 8-Figure Brand (E-commerce, Remote)
description:
Recruiter Purpose

The purpose of the Recruiter role at Primal Storm is to recruit, interview, and coordinate the hiring of top-of-the-line talent to embrace our culture & deliver immense value for our customers.



As a recruiter, you understand that the quality of our results is a direct result of the quality of our talent. Without the best talent coming into the company, the best results cannot come out of the company.



You live and breathe culture and ensure that the talent we onboard is not only skilled, but also highly motivated by the performance-driven, fast-paced environment we operate in.



You are driven by the idea of being able to provide opportunities for A-players to thrive in our company. You specialize in connecting people and building teams that operate together at the highest level. You achieve your success by putting others in a position to achieve their own.



Most importantly, you understand that this company is a direct reflection of its people. The type of talent you attract & hire to be a part of this company is what will ultimately build it.



Your active purpose at Primal Storm is to find and hire the best of the best talent & work alongside subject matter experts and the founders to continue to bring talent into our company.



Primary Roles

- Actively recruiting talent and building/nurturing relationships

- Publishing job posts for new positions on platforms such as Linkedin, Indeed, Upwork, Onlinejobs PH

- Asking for referrals and making social posts on the company's behalf for new positions

- Processing applications and requesting videos from top candidates

- Handle initial screening calls with approved video applicants and sending assessments

- Reviewing assessments with subject matter experts and founders to qualify talent

- Organize meetings for subject matter experts and the founders to finalize hires

- Onboarding all new talent following Primal Storm onboarding systems

- Communicating with pod leaders and founders for upcoming job openings

- Manage all hiring systems to organize all talent

- Track and monitor key hiring metrics: Application completion %, Qualified candidates %, Time to fill, Time to hire, Cost per hire, Quality of hire

- Lead onboarding calls with all new hires

- Analyze the stages of the hiring journey to identify friction points & opportunities

- Work with management to build systems and tools to improve hiring processes

- Work directly with the founders to identify new hiring opportunities



Qualifications & Character Traits

- Incredibly strong communicator & very well spoken with team & candidates

- Avid listener with the ability to give others your undivided attention

- An eye for talent and able to quickly identify great potential fits

- People-person with strong relationship building skills

- High emotional intelligence and ability to understand others clearly

- Master at building rapport & taking a genuine interest in people

- Quick learner who sees every failure as one step closer to success

- Extreme level of attention to detail

- Ability to identify bottlenecks & engineer solutions for them

- Time-efficient, but willing to spend extra time to do things right



This is NOT For You If:

- You are an agency

- You are not well-spoken

- You cannot listen to others

- You don’t know how to build rapport

- You have never hired someone before

- You are not a good communicator

- You accept mediocrity

- You don’t like a high-operating environment

- You shy away from problems

- You are not a team player

 response — quick diagnosis and clear communication
