-A portfolio or writing samples that demonstrate brand voice adaptability and consumer-oriented messaging.

-Familiarity with Amazon e-commerce, health and wellness, or OTC skin products is a plus but not required.



Skill Sets



-Excellent writing and editing skills with a sharp editorial eye for both accuracy and consumer appeal.

-Research-driven mindset. You investigate before you write.

-Structured creative thinking. Able to break a single product into multiple testable angles, benefits, and hooks.

-You can internalize a brand's tone and execute it consistently across formats.

-Collaborative, low-ego, and self-directed. You take high-level direction and run with it.

-Intellectually honest with data. You let performance results guide the next iteration.

-Welcomes direct feedback and iterates quickly.

-Fast learner motivated to grow into new areas of marketing beyond content.



What’s In It for You:



-Competitive salary: $2,000 to $2,500 USD per month.

-Competitive raise based on performance.

-Paid vacation.

-Professional development opportunities.

-Opportunity to grow into a senior marketing role as the team and brand expand.

-Be part of a close-knit and supportive team that values your input and relies on your expertise.

-Collaboration without micromanagement.

-Work-life balance.

title: Content Specialist / Senior Copywriter
description:
Job Title: Content Specialist / Senior Copywriter | Remote



Location: Asia or similar time zones (UTC +8)

Salary: $2,000-$2,500/month gross

Schedule: Full-time, 40 hours/week 



Only English CVs will be accepted.



Retalent Agency is a global remote recruitment agency that connects talented professionals like you with top companies in e-commerce, marketing, and tech. Since 2019, we’ve helped hundreds of candidates from Latin America, Eastern Europe, Asia, and South Africa land full-time remote roles with international teams.



When you apply through Retalent, you’re not just applying for a job; you’re stepping into a community of growing businesses and ambitious professionals.



Let us help you find the right opportunity to grow your career from anywhere in the world.



Our Client:



Founded by two sisters who grew up navigating eczema and fungal skin infections within their own family, this brand was built on a deeply personal mission. Drawing from heritage botanical wisdom and combining it with research-backed science, they create potent, plant-powered skin remedies that genuinely make a difference.



With over 1.5 million products delivered, 25,000+ five-star reviews, and a decade of customer trust, they have established themselves as a beloved name in natural skincare. Now, they are expanding into new channels and audiences to reach even more families who need their products.



They are a small, US-based, globally distributed team that believes great content is how great products find the people who need them. Everything they create lives by one standard: Ingredients Matter: Pure, Potent, Proven.



In This Role, You’ll:



Act as a sharp, detail-oriented content writer with a strong sense of brand voice and consumer appeal. This is a content-focused role built around your ability to research deeply, write compelling copy across multiple formats, and serve as the quality gate for all customer-facing content.



You'll work closely with our co-founders and Assistant Marketing Manager as part of a globally distributed team. AI tools are central to how we work, you'll use them to accelerate research, generate drafts, and iterate quickly. Your judgment, brand instinct, and editorial eye are what make the output great.



This is a full-time, remote position with working hours that substantially overlap UTC+8. How you communicate and collaborate matters as much as your talent and qualifications.



What You'll Be Doing



-Content Creation: Write scripts for TikTok branded videos, Amazon video ads, and future ad platforms. Create
 copy, website content, educational articles for AEO/ GEO visibility, and long-form content.

-Creative Testing & Messaging: Develop systematic messaging variations for messaging and creative testing, breaking down product angles, benefits, and hooks to identify what resonates through data.

-Content Review & Refinement: Serve as the brand voice quality gate. Review and refine output from AI tools and third-party platforms (such as Amazon listing optimization tools) for accuracy, consumer appeal, and brand alignment.

-Research & Consumer Insights: Conduct deep product, market, and competitive research. Mine customer reviews, forums, and social conversations to understand real customer language, pain points, and motivations. Use these insights to shape stronger messaging.

-Content Repurposing & Social Media: Adapt existing content (video scripts,
 copy, product messaging, articles) into social media posts across Instagram,
 
, and other platforms.

-Creative Briefing: Write clear, actionable briefs for graphic designers and TikTok content creators to keep visual and verbal messaging aligned and on-brand.

-Additional Marketing Support: Contribute to other marketing initiatives as needed, including Amazon customer Q&A, review engagement, and emerging projects that support the company’s growth objectives.



What You’ll Bring:



-2 to 4 years of experience in content writing, copywriting, or brand communications, ideally for U.S.-facing consumer brands.

-Strong written English with the ability to produce polished, consumer-facing copy that sounds natural to a U.S. audience. Fluent in spoken English.

-Demonstrated ability to write across formats: video scripts, product copy,
, social media, website, and long-form articles.

-Skilled at prompting AI writing and research tools (e.g., Claude, ChatGPT, or similar) to produce high-quality output. AI is a core part of our content workflow, not an occasional aid.

-Strong research skills and instinct. You dig into products, competitors, reviews, social signals, and customer conversations before you start writing.

-A portfolio or writing samples that demonstrate brand voice adaptability and consumer-oriented messaging.

-Familiarity with Amazon e-commerce, health and wellness, or OTC skin products is a plus but not required.



Skill Sets



-Excellent writing and editing skills with a sharp editorial eye for both accuracy and consumer appeal.

-Research-driven mindset. You investigate before you write.

-Structured creative thinking. Able to break a single product into multiple testable angles, benefits, and hooks.

-You can internalize a brand's tone and execute it consistently across formats.

-Collaborative, low-ego, and self-directed. You take high-level direction and run with it.

-Intellectually honest with data. You let performance results guide the next iteration.

-Welcomes direct feedback and iterates quickly.

-Fast learner motivated to grow into new areas of marketing beyond content.



What’s In It for You:



-Competitive salary: $2,000 to $2,500 USD per month.

-Competitive raise based on performance.

-Paid vacation.

-Professional development opportunities.

-Opportunity to grow into a senior marketing role as the team and brand expand.

-Be part of a close-knit and supportive team that values your input and relies on your expertise.

-Collaboration without micromanagement.

-Work-life balance.

title: Account Manager
description:
About Rockenue

Rockenue is a technology-powered commercial management company for hotels. We handle revenue management, distribution, sales, and tech implementation for a growing portfolio of properties across Europe.



We're looking for someone with energy, hunger, and common sense — not necessarily a long CV.

You'll take ownership of a portfolio of hotel accounts, acting as the day-to-day point of contact for property partners. You'll produce reports, manage distribution channels, solve problems, and keep everything running smoothly. We'll teach you the hospitality side. What we can't teach is drive, initiative, and the ability to figure things out.

If you're the kind of person who Googles the answer before asking the question, who takes pride in getting things right, and who genuinely gets a buzz from being on top of everything — keep reading.



What You'll Be Doing



Managing a portfolio of hotel accounts end-to-end, acting as the main point of contact for property owners and managers

Producing and delivering regular performance reports to clients

Working inside OTA extranets (
, Expedia, etc.), channel managers, and property management systems daily

Monitoring rate parity, availability, and distribution health across all channels

Coordinating with the internal team on pricing updates, promotions, and new channel activations

Identifying revenue opportunities and flagging underperformance

Using AI tools, chatbots, and automation to streamline workflows and increase output

Learning and mastering new hospitality tech platforms quickly





Who You Are (This Matters More Than Your CV)



Relentless work ethic. You take ownership. You don't clock-watch. When something needs doing, you do it — properly and fast.

Common sense over credentials. You can walk into an unfamiliar situation, assess it logically, and figure out the right move without being hand-held.

Tech-obsessed, not tech-tolerant. You genuinely enjoy learning new systems. Complex dashboards and unfamiliar software excite you rather than intimidate you.

AI is already part of your workflow. You actively use tools like ChatGPT, Claude, or similar to get more done. This isn't optional — it's central to how we work.

Proactive by nature. You spot problems before they're reported. You suggest improvements nobody asked for. You hate sitting idle.

Clear communicator. Excellent written and verbal English. You can explain something simply, flag an issue professionally, and keep a client confident.

Detail-oriented without losing the big picture. You catch the small errors but still understand why they matter commercially.



Hospitality experience is a plus but absolutely not required. If you've never touched a hotel extranet but you're sharp, motivated, and learn fast — we want to hear from you. We will train the right person.



Application Requirements

Your application must include a short video introduction (2–3 minutes) covering:



Who you are and a bit about your background

Why you'd be a great fit for Rockenue specifically

A brief example of how you use AI or automation tools in your current or recent work



Applications without a video will not be considered. This is the single most important part of your application — show us your energy and personality.



Compensation

Competitive monthly salary (paid in GBP/USD), commensurate with experience. Long-term position with real room to grow as the portfolio scales.

title: Video Editor for High-End Branding Product Videos - Experience with AI
description:
About Us:



We are a rapidly growing marketing agency from Germany, recognized as a market leader in our field. Our team is young, motivated, and passionate about producing outstanding content. We specialize in creating high-quality, aesthetic product videos for online shops and Amazon product pages. These are not simple UGC e-commerce clips, but branding-oriented videos that elevate the perception of a product and make it stand out.



As we continue to expand, we're looking for Remote Video Editors to join our team for a long-term commitment.





Job Description:



We are seeking a talented and experienced Video Editor with a strong sense for aesthetics and branding. You will be provided with all the raw material and a detailed video script for each project.



Additionally, you should be capable of generating shots with AI tools and, when necessary, further enhancing or compositing them in After Effects (e.g. adding motion graphics, text overlays, visual polish).



The role is entirely remote, requiring a high-speed internet connection due to the large size of the projects (avg. 100GB) for efficient uploads and downloads.





Training:



To ensure you're set up for success, we provide an extensive course on editing product videos, created by our team. Watching and learning from this course marks the beginning of our collaboration.





Trial Period:



The first week is a paid trial phase, where you'll go through our course and complete a test project. If the quality meets our standards, we will proceed with a permanent employment offer.



Requirements:



• Strong experience in video editing

• Very good in Premiere Pro

• Good in After Effects and Photoshop

• Experience with AI-based shot generation and video enhancement

• Strong aesthetic sense and design skills

• Good English skills

• Interested in a full-time role (40 hours/week) and looking for long-term employment (years)





How to Apply:



Please submit your application with the subject "Gold-Video-Candidate" and include videos of your previous work.





Traits We Value:

• Ability to follow clear instructions and processes

• Discipline and determination

• Eagerness to create amazing, aesthetic product videos with branding impact

• Passion for pushing creative and technical boundaries





Benefits:

• Paid time off and paid holidays

• 13th-month pay

• Annual performance-based salary bonus/increases

• Internal training with exclusive knowledge





Join Us:



If you're passionate about creating high-end, branding-focused product videos and are looking for a long-term, fulfilling career, we'd love to hear from you. Apply today to become a part of our success story!

title: AMAZING VIDEO EDITOR WANTED FOR 7-FIGURE ECOM BUSINESS
description:
Hey there,



My team and I are looking for a new tea
mber to join our amazing 7-figure eCommerce dropshipping business team. Currently we are in need of someone that is responsible for a very important task of this business: direct response video editing and graphic photo ads for our paid marketing.



It's essential that you are experienced with eCommerce/dropshipping and creating high-converting video and photo ads.

You will need to build scroll-stopping video ads and static graphic ads from scratch, as well as translate and localize our existing winning ads into different languages.



Please read the 4R model below for all the information that we expect, such as Role, Responsibilities, Results and Requirements.

Reports To: Process Manager / CEO



ROLE

Providing scroll-stopping, high-converting video and photo ads on a daily basis. You are the person responsible for the most crucial part of our marketing: getting the customer's attention. You ensure that every ad is built with a strong direct response framework, whether you are creating a video or static image from scratch, or translating a winning ad into a new language.



RESPONSIBILITIES

Creating high-quality, engaging video ads and static photo ads for platforms like Meta™ 
/Instagram) from scratch, using raw footage, images, UGC, or sourced clips.

Translating and localizing existing winning ads into different languages, adjusting text overlays, captions, and integrating AI voiceovers if necessary.

Knowing how to work with professional editing software. You are completely free to choose which software you prefer to use (e.g., Premiere Pro, CapCut, After Effects, Photoshop, Canva, etc.), as long as the end result is high-converting.

Maintaining a certain benchmark that is created by the Process Manager.



RESULTS

Making sure all the work is finished within a certain time frame.

Thinking along with the CEO and Process Manager to create perfect visual marketing concepts and hooks.

Improving yourself and the results everyday.

- You speak & write English fluently and have a great eye for formatting translated texts accurately.

- You have experience with eCommerce and know what the requirements of a high-converting direct response video or photo ad are.

- Being able to use different kind of systems & programs that are used for professional video and photo editing.

title: General Async Admin (remote)
description:
Overview

We’re hiring async-first freelance admins to support clear, structured workflows using ClickUp. This is a flexible, zero-hour role for detail-oriented individuals who enjoy working independently, communicating clearly, and delivering polished admin work without supervision or meetings.

What You’ll Do

• Receive task assignments through ClickUp

• Execute written or operational tasks based on structured briefs

• Return deliverables in clean, readable formats (comment or doc)

• Raise blockers, questions, or clarifications asynchronously

• Work independently with consistency and timeliness

You’re a Great Fit If You

• Communicate clearly and professionally in writing

• Prefer async, flexible work over live meetings

• Work well without needing check-ins or supervision

• Enjoy turning clear briefs into quality outcomes

• Are responsive and respectful of async timelines

Tools You’ll Use

???? ClickUp – to receive and submit tasks

Engagement & Pay

Freelance / zero-hour contract

Work is offered on an availability basis

Minimum 1-hour tasks

No guaranteed hours — reliable contributors get priority

This is a task-based role. The monthly figure reflects typical earnings based on available work, but hours and workload may vary week to week

???? Pay Bands

£5 – light admin / short-format tasks

£7 – moderately scoped workflows

£10 – complex formatting or structured deliverables

Onboarding Process

???? NDA Required First

All applicants must sign a lightweight NDA before accessing onboarding tasks. This ensures client and process confidentiality.

???? Paid Onboarding Tasks

All onboarding and evaluation tasks are paid. These initial tasks are designed to help you understand our workflow while allowing us to assess quality, clarity, and communication.

???? Paid Trial Round

You’ll complete a small set of paid async tasks aligned with the pay bands above.

If successful, you’ll be invited into our async freelance pool.

?? How We Review Work

Work is reviewed for structure, clarity, and tone.

No interviews — just written feedback.

???? Retry-Friendly

Not perfect on your first attempt? No problem.

You’ll get feedback and a chance to retry — we value growth over perfection.

This Role Is Ideal For

? Async-first professionals who prefer solo workflows

? Neurodivergent thinkers who enjoy structure

? Freelancers looking for flexible, meeting-free work

* You are comfortable working with AI Girls / AI creator profiles

* You are available daily and can respond quickly when new notifications come in

* You understand that this role is all about timing, speed, and high-impact engagement



Important: application requirements



To apply, you must send proof of previous experience.



Please include:



* Examples of accounts you worked on

* Screenshots of results, engagement work, or growth performance

* A short explanation of what exactly you did

* Your availability per day



Why work with us



* Clear SOPs

* Clear targets

* Clear bonus structure

* Performance-based bonuses on top of fixed pay for high-impact work

* Long-term opportunity inside a fast-scaling AI creator agency

* Fast path from part-time to full-time for the right person



What matters most



This role is about speed after a competitor posts.



That is where the opportunity is.

That is how we win attention.

That is how we push our profiles harder.

That is how we go viral.



Apply now if you already have the experience and can prove it.

title: YouTube Video Maker
description:
We have an AI tool to assist in making YouTube videos.



You'll be using this tool to make videos, however the tool needs inputs (such as a proper script and video structure).

We are looking for someone who has experience with YouTube and can confidently make these outlines, operate the tool, and carefully checks the output.



The reviewing is a big part of the role aswell, checking to make sure the video looks good, and making revisions if necessary.

Price per video made: $5



You'd be doing atleast 1 - 2 videos per day (more depending on what you can handle).



Requirement to apply: send a short recording of yourself on why you are a good fit (20 seconds minimum) via google drive to significantly increase the chance we hire you.

title: Looking for a Hiring Manager
description:
We are looking for a hiring manager for our YouTube media company.



What you'll be doing:

- Making job posts (account will be provided)

- Communicating with applicants, following up on new-hires

- Making decisions on the best fit and sending their details to our team

- Making payments and tracking the expenses

- Keeping an organized overview of the hiring in progress

(one of these tasks may be swapped out for a different one if relevant)



Requirements:

- High English proficiency (Completely fluent!)

- Very fast responses

- High availability

- Must be available for an occasional call to explain or discuss matters



**DO NOT** Use AI to apply for this position, we will know. Please write the application yourself, even if its short include key details to explain why you are the best fit for this role.



Requirement to apply: send a short recording of yourself on why you are a good fit (20 seconds minimum) via google drive to significantly increase the chance we hire you.

title: Property Operations Coordinator  -  Buildium
description:
Alamo Apartments operates a portfolio of studio apartments in Ohio.  We partner with multiple agencies to coordinate renting using voucher programs including HUD.   



Property Operations Coordinator insures a high percentage of occupancy and rent collection.  



If you have previous experience in this field and / or with Buildium.  Please tell me about it.  Video into or voice sample is not required but, requested.  



The position starts at 20 hrs per week and can be promoted to full time.

title: Social Media Assistant
description:
I run multiple TikTok pages in the affiliate marketing space and I’m looking for a reliable Virtual Assistant to support daily content sourcing and engagement.



This is a long-term role for someone who can follow instructions exactly, work quickly, and stay consistent.



I already have a proven system — your role is to execute tasks daily and accurately.



Responsibilities:



Source TikTok-style video clips using keywords provided



Find clips that match specific styles and examples



Remove watermarks using tools like SnapTik



Organize clips into folders (raw, cleaned, used, etc.)



Track clips in a Google Sheet / Notion system



Leave comments on posts to increase engagement (scripts provided)



Reply to comments when instructed



Follow content systems and workflows exactly as provided



(Future Role) Repurpose content to:



YouTube Shorts



Instagram Reels



IMPORTANT:



This is for affiliate marketing content.



You are NOT responsible for:



Editing videos



Writing scripts or hooks



Strategy



Your role is execution only — follow instructions and complete tasks consistently.



Daily KPI Targets:



30–50 clips sourced



All clips must be watermark-free



Clips must be organized correctly



Engagement tasks completed daily



Requirements:



Fluent in written English



Strong and stable internet connection (speed test required)



Must have a separate phone dedicated to work (iPhone preferred)



Comfortable using TikTok daily



Organized and detail-oriented



Able to follow instructions exactly



Fast and consistent worker



Preferred (Not Required):



Experience with TikTok or short-form content



Familiar with watermark removal tools



Experience with Google Sheets or Notion



Experience with proxies or managing multiple accounts



Workload & Pay:



Part-time (3–5 hours per day)



$300–$350/month depending on experience



Paid trial period (3–5 days) before full hire



Tracking:



You will update a shared Google Sheet / Notion dashboard daily with:



Clip links



Status (new / used / potential)



Notes



Interview Process:



Shortlist applicants



Paid test task



3–5 day trial period



Hiring decision based on performance



To Apply:



Please include:



Short introduction



Any experience with TikTok or social media



Screenshot of your internet speed



What phone you will use for work



Start your application with the word “CLEAN” so I know you read everything.



Looking for someone reliable who can grow with me long-term as I scale.

title: Video Ad Creative Designer — Dog Health Supplement Niche
description:
We are building a dog joint supplement brand targeting the German market. We create soft chew supplements for dogs and we need talented people to help us produce high-converting ad creatives.



 What we're looking for:

- Someone experienced in creating video or static ad creatives for pet/health/supplement niches

- Ability to produce UGC-style, emotional, or product-focused creatives

- Comfortable using AI tools (Midjourney, Runway, CapCut...) — this is a plus

- Fast turnaround and attention to detail



 How it works:

- DM me if you're interested

- We discuss your rate and send you a paid test brief

- You produce one creative — this test is compensated at an agreed hourly rate

- If the quality matches what we're looking for, we move forward with a longer collaboration



 Payment:

- Hourly rate — to be discussed based on your experience and scope of work

- All work including the test brief is paid

- Long-term opportunity: if the collaboration goes well, we are open to a monthly retainer



Please include in your DM:

- Examples of past creatives (pet, health, or e-commerce)

- Your tools and workflow

- Your hourly rate

- Your availability



 Brand identity and visual guidelines will be shared privately once we move forward.



A detailed brief is attached. Looking forward to working with talented creators.

title: Roofing Estimator
description:
RESPONSIBLITIES:



General contractor relationships: build and maintain relationships with general contractors.

Inside sales: identifying the industries/government entities that use our services that are vital to build a solid book of new business clients.

Sufficient knowledge of the concrete polishing and coating industry: (installation, decorative concrete, overlayments, concrete repair, equipment, tooling, moisture control, coatings.)

Ability to listen and understand customer’s project goals to competently make recommendations that are in the best interest of the customer and best use of their investment.

Able to interpret architectural plans and specifications, construction design elements and make technical recommendations and submit RFI’s and substitution requests.

Able to proficiently discuss concrete polishing, decorative concrete and epoxy systems.

Generate and create opportunities and new leads with general contractors, retail chains, government entities, facilities managers & architect/designers.

Follow up on proposals and close sales.

Hand off project to management and field team seamlessly to ensure no balls are dropped and customer needs are met.

Maintain client satisfaction level.

Work collaboratively with the project management and field team.

Work with vendors and manufacturers on product specifications.

Negotiate with customers on all facets of a project including logistics, schedule, etc.

Work closely with the President to ensure a fair pricing structure for customers.

Bid profitable projects: identifying, analyzing and quantifying materials/labour for jobs.

Maintains and updates the CRM.

Maintains and oversees the internal bidding process and bid invitations.

Construction take-offs using take-off software.

REQUIREMENTS:



Proven work experience in construction estimating and inside sales/relationship management.

Outstanding organisational and time management skills.

Ability to multitask and prioritise daily workload.

Discretion and confidentiality.

Excellent verbal and written communication skills.

MS Office, Take-off/estimating software, English proficiency

Good verbal communication skills.

A valid state driver’s license is required.

Strong work ethic.

Analytical

Decisiveness/good judgment, problem-solving and analytical skills to act with authority and take risks in an environment with little direction from others.

Market awareness.

Ability to work autonomously.

Strong attention to detail.

Computer and software skills and experience, ability to learn new tools quickly and with ease

Understanding of commercial construction

WOULD PREFER:



Minimum five (5) years of estimating and sales experience

Strong track record of sales in the construction field.

REQUIRED EXPERIENCE:



Construction estimating: 2 years

title: SA Operations Lead + Project Coordination (UK Hours)
description:
We are a UK-based property investment and serviced accommodation (SA) management company. We operate seven serviced accommodation units and focus on delivering a consistent, high-standard guest experience through strong operational systems and quality control. Alongside SA operations, we run two to three active refurbishment/development projects at any given time, coordinating contractors, procurement, documentation, and stakeholder communication to deliver projects efficiently and to a high standard.



This is a hands-on Operations Lead role responsible for execution across our serviced accommodation portfolio and coordination support across refurbishment/development projects. Your core focus is proactive quality control and consistent delivery: you’ll enforce standards through checklists and evidence, ensure guests have a smooth end-to-end experience, and reduce recurring issues by continuously improving SOPs. In parallel, you’ll support project coordination for refurbishments by running follow-ups with contractors and suppliers, managing documentation, and scheduling appointments to keep workstreams moving without drift.



We’re hiring an Operations Lead who can run a cadence, enforce quality standards, and coordinate delivery across both serviced accommodation and active refurb projects.



Monday- Sunday:10:00-18:00 ( with 1 hour break) UK time, Saturday or Sunday off for one day.

Salary :700 USD Per month+ KPI bonus



Core responsibilities

Serviced Accommodation operations (delivery + standards)

- Enforce unit standards using checklists, photo evidence, and “definition of done” quality bars.

- Manage guest communications: fast responses, professional tone, calm resolution, and proactive updates.

- Maintain an issues/defects log and ensure issues are fully closed with root-cause prevention (not just “ticket closed”).

- Coordinate cleaners and operational VAs: confirm turnovers, verify quality, and drive consistent performance.

- Monitor pricing and availability: check pricing rules are being applied, flag risks/opportunities, and escalate recommendations.

- Create and update listings: listing setup, copy accuracy, amenities, house rules, photo requirements, and platform compliance ( ---------- as applicable).

- Maintain and improve SOPs: update processes based on recurring issues, guest feedback, and operational learnings.

Property project coordination (admin execution)

- Maintain a project tracker for tasks, owners, due dates, and blockers.

- Source and compare quotes: produce a quote comparison table and recommendation.

- Follow-up with contractors, suppliers, utilities, council, other professional, keep reference numbers, paper trail, and next-step ownership.

- Documentation: build/format/update project packs, submissions, and version control.

- Appointment scheduling: inspections, contractor visits, deliveries, surveys, and access coordination.

Reporting directly to company CEO



Tools and working style

- We use Lark for communication, tracking, and internal workflows.

- Google Drive for document storage and document control.

- PMS/pricing tools as applicable (Hostaway/PriceLabs or similar).



Must-have experience

- Evidence-based quality control: Create and used checklists/audits/photo evidence used to enforce standards and reduce recurring issues.

- Serviced accommodation or hospitality ops: guest comms + turnover coordination + issue resolution.

- Property management working experience

- Vendor/contractor coordination: proactive follow-up, scheduling, and timeline control.

- Strong written English: crisp guest messaging and concise leadership updates.

- SOP ownership: has maintained/improved SOPs based on operational reality, not just followed them.

Nice-to-have experience

- Listing creation and optimization ( ---------- ).

- Pricing/availability monitoring and familiarity with revenue management tools (e.g., PriceLabs).

- Property management operations or refurb coordination admin.

Personality traits we’re looking for

- Conscientious and detail-accurate.

- Proactive follow-up and ownership mindset.

- Structured and process-driven (lives in checklists/trackers).

- Calm, professional, and solution-oriented with guests and vendors.

- Improves systems continuously rather than firefighting repeatedly.

- Well organised with multiple task and able to prioritise



Hiring process:

Step 1: Answer the Google link below (required) and follow the instructions after.

Step 2: Answer scenario based questions

Step 3: Join 20-minute screening call

Step 4: Paid trial task

Step 5: Final interview + references



HOW TO APPLY:



Click the link ----------

I’ll be in touch with you in 3-5 working days.



Please note, we ONLY accept applications through this application process. PLEASE DO NOT use the website’s message board as we don’t monitor this.

title: Serviced Accommodation Operations Manager (Standards + QA)
description:
We are a UK-based property investment and serviced accommodation (SA) management company. We operate seven serviced accommodation units and focus on delivering a consistent, high-standard guest experience through strong operational systems and quality control. Alongside SA operations, we run two to three active refurbishment/development projects at any given time, coordinating contractors, procurement, documentation, and stakeholder communication to deliver projects efficiently and to a high standard.



This is a hands-on Operations Lead role responsible for execution across our serviced accommodation portfolio and coordination support across refurbishment/development projects. Your core focus is proactive quality control and consistent delivery: you’ll enforce standards through checklists and evidence, ensure guests have a smooth end-to-end experience, and reduce recurring issues by continuously improving SOPs. In parallel, you’ll support project coordination for refurbishments by running follow-ups with contractors and suppliers, managing documentation, and scheduling appointments to keep workstreams moving without drift.



We’re hiring an Operations Lead who can run a cadence, enforce quality standards, and coordinate delivery across both serviced accommodation and active refurb projects.



Monday- Sunday:10:00-18:00 ( with 1 hour break) UK time, Saturday or Sunday off for one day.

Salary :700 USD Per month+ KPI bonus



Core responsibilities

Serviced Accommodation operations (delivery + standards)

- Enforce unit standards using checklists, photo evidence, and “definition of done” quality bars.

- Manage guest communications: fast responses, professional tone, calm resolution, and proactive updates.

- Maintain an issues/defects log and ensure issues are fully closed with root-cause prevention (not just “ticket closed”).

- Coordinate cleaners and operational VAs: confirm turnovers, verify quality, and drive consistent performance.

- Monitor pricing and availability: check pricing rules are being applied, flag risks/opportunities, and escalate recommendations.

- Create and update listings: listing setup, copy accuracy, amenities, house rules, photo requirements, and platform compliance (
 as applicable).

- Maintain and improve SOPs: update processes based on recurring issues, guest feedback, and operational learnings.

Property project coordination (admin execution)

- Maintain a project tracker for tasks, owners, due dates, and blockers.

- Source and compare quotes: produce a quote comparison table and recommendation.

- Follow-up with contractors, suppliers, utilities, council, other professional, keep reference numbers, paper trail, and next-step ownership.

- Documentation: build/format/update project packs, submissions, and version control.

- Appointment scheduling: inspections, contractor visits, deliveries, surveys, and access coordination.

Reporting directly to company CEO



Tools and working style

- We use Lark for communication, tracking, and internal workflows.

- Google Drive for document storage and document control.

- PMS/pricing tools as applicable (Hostaway/PriceLabs or similar).



Must-have experience

- Evidence-based quality control: Create and used checklists/audits/photo evidence used to enforce standards and reduce recurring issues.

- Serviced accommodation or hospitality ops: guest comms + turnover coordination + issue resolution.

- Property management working experience

- Vendor/contractor coordination: proactive follow-up, scheduling, and timeline control.

- Strong written English: crisp guest messaging and concise leadership updates.

- SOP ownership: has maintained/improved SOPs based on operational reality, not just followed them.

Nice-to-have experience

- Listing creation and optimization (
).

- Pricing/availability monitoring and familiarity with revenue management tools (e.g., PriceLabs).

- Property management operations or refurb coordination admin.

Personality traits we’re looking for

- Conscientious and detail-accurate.

- Proactive follow-up and ownership mindset.

- Structured and process-driven (lives in checklists/trackers).

- Calm, professional, and solution-oriented with guests and vendors.

- Improves systems continuously rather than firefighting repeatedly.

- Well organised with multiple task and able to prioritise

title: Video Editor for Cinematic Product Videos in a German Agency
description:
About Us:



We are a rapidly growing marketing agency from Germany, recognized as a market leader in our field. Our team is young, motivated, and passionate about producing outstanding content. We specialize in creating high-quality product videos for online shops and Amazon product pages. As we continue to expand, we're looking for Remote Video Editors to join our team for a long-term commitment.





Job Description:



We are seeking a talented and experienced Video Editor to cut product videos. You will be provided with all the raw material and a detailed video script for each project. The role is entirely remote, requiring a high-speed internet connection due to the large size of the projects (avg. 100GB) for efficient uploads and downloads.





Training:



To ensure you're set up for success, we provide an extensive course on editing product videos, created by our team. Watching and learning from this course marks the beginning of our collaboration.





Trial Period:



The first week is a paid trial phase, where you'll go through our course and complete a test project. If the quality meets our standards, we will proceed with a permanent employment offer.





Requirements:



Experience in video editing

• Very good in Premiere Pro

• Good in After Effects and Photoshop

• Strong aesthetic sense and design skills

• Good English skills

• Interested in a full-time role (40 hours/week) and looking for long-term employment (years)





How to Apply:



Please submit your application with the subject "Gold-Video-Candidate" and include videos of your previous work.





Traits We Value:



• Ability to follow clear instructions and processes

• Discipline and determination

•. Eagerness to create amazing videos and push the limits





Benefits:



• Paid time off and paid holidays

• 13th-month pay

• Annual performance-based salary bonus/increases

• Internal training with exclusive knowledge





Join Us:



If you're passionate about making a significant impact with your video editing skills and are looking for a long-term, fulfilling career, we'd love to hear from you. Apply today to become a part of our success story!

description:

The project is at an early stage, but there are already many things to set up and structure.

Project & Operations Management

mbers

Shopify and dropshipping

Amazon projects

Leadership & Future Growth

mbers

title: Senior UI/UX Designer (Custom Web + Mobile Apps)  US Remote
description:
** PLEASE READ THIS JOB DESCRIPTION TO THE END.   IF YOU DO NOT FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS, WE WILL NOT CONSIDER YOUR APPLICATION.



About the Role



We’re looking for a senior UI/UX designer who crafts distinctive, non-template websites and polished mobile app experiences. You’ll lead projects end-to-end—from discovery and UX strategy to high-fidelity UI, motion specs, and developer handoff—building design systems that feel truly bespoke while shipping fast with engineering.



What You’ll Do

 •Own the product & brand experience: Turn vague goals into sharp briefs, user journeys, sitemaps, and information architecture. Establish a unique visual language (layout, typography, color, art direction) that does not read like a theme.

 •Design custom marketing & product websites: Responsive layouts across breakpoints, performance-minded components, empty/loading/error/zero states, and conversion-focused flows.

 •Design mobile apps (iOS & Android): Define navigation models, key flows, platform-native patterns, and micro-interactions; deliver tappable prototypes for usability tests.

 •Ship scalable design systems: Tokens, components, variants, grid systems, and accessibility-first patterns (WCAG 2.2 AA). Maintain a living library in Figma.

 •Prototype & spec motion: Create interaction prototypes (Figma prototyping/Framer/ProtoPie), motion guidelines, and Lottie-ready animations where useful.

 •Test & iterate with data: Plan quick studies, run usability tests, and partner on analytics to move metrics (task completion, funnel conversion, retention).

 •Partner tightly with engineering: Map designs to React/Next.js or React Native components, provide redlines and Dev Mode annotations, review staging, and resolve edge cases.





What You’ve Done



 • 5+ years designing custom, non-template websites with shipped examples that show original art direction.

 • 2+ years designing mobile apps (shipped to App Store/Play or robust prototypes).

 • Deep mastery of Figma (Auto Layout, components/variants, constraints, styles/tokens, Dev Mode).

 • Strong command of typography, grids, composition, and color; you can explain your decisions clearly.

 • Solid UX research & strategy skills (journey mapping, heuristic evals, JTBD thinking) and accessibility know-how.

 • Practical understanding of web fundamentals (responsive behavior, image optimization, Core Web Vitals) and dev handoff (design tokens, Storybook mapping, Tailwind-friendly specs).

 • Excellent written UX copy for microcopy, labels, and in-product messaging (bonus).



Nice to Have

 • E-commerce flows (checkout, PDPs, bundles), CMS-driven sites, dashboards/B2B SaaS.

 • Motion design (After Effects/Lottie), illustration/icon systems.

 • Experience with AI/LLM UX patterns, localization, and design for performance.





Portfolio Requirements (must include links)

 1. 3–5 custom websites (no themes)—describe your role, constraints, and the specific choices that make each feel bespoke.

 2. 2 mobile apps (store/TestFlight/Play links or prototypes).

 3. 1 process case study showing discovery ? iterations ? results (include metrics or qualitative impact).





How We Work

 • Weekly design reviews, async updates, and close PM/dev collaboration.

 • Tools: Figma/FigJam, Framer or ProtoPie, Notion, Linear/Jira, Slack, Loom.

 • We ship in focused design sprints with quick validation loops.





What Success Looks Like (90 Days)

 • 30 days: Audit current brand/product, ship a bespoke homepage concept + mobile nav pattern, establish initial tokens/components.

 • 60 days: Launch a custom web experience (one core flow) and a tappable mobile prototype; document the design system v1.

 • 90 days: Improve a key metric (e.g., +15–25% on a target conversion or task success) through iterations and validated UX changes.





Application



Reply to the job post with subject line:

“Senior UI/UX Designer — [Your Name]”

Include:

 • 3 bullet points on how you avoid “template look” on the web.

 • 1 mobile pattern trade-off you recently made (and why).

 • Your comp expectations, preferred engagement type (FT/contract), and timezone.



* If you do not follow this format, we will not consider your application.





Short, Paid Design Exercise (final stage)

 • Brief: Redesign the above-the-fold of a local e-commerce homepage (desktop + one mobile breakpoint) to look unmistakably custom.

 • Deliverables (within 48 hours): Figma file with grid, type scale, components, and a 1-page rationale for decisions (art direction, motion opportunities, performance & accessibility notes).

title: Elite Creative Strategist (Ads | Video | AI Creative)
description:
We are not hiring beginners.



We are looking for A-Players—people who execute well, think critically, and care about producing high-performing creatives.



You will receive guidance, resources, and training from us. What matters is your ability to apply feedback and continuously improve.



Generic, low-effort work is not acceptable.



---



**WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING**



* Static Ad Design 
, Instagram, TikTok, etc.)

* Video Editing (VSLs, UGC-style ads, short-form content)

* AI-Generated Ads (both static and video)



We care about performance, not just aesthetics. Your work should drive clicks, conversions, and revenue.



---



**REQUIREMENTS (NON-NEGOTIABLE)**



You MUST have solid experience in ALL of the following:



1. Ad Creative Design

2. Ad Video Editing (VSL / UGC / Direct Response)

3. AI Ad Creation (Static + Video)



You don’t need to be perfect—but you must already be competent in all three.



---



**APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS (STRICT)**



To be considered, your application MUST include ALL of the following:



1. Full Portfolio Link

   (Google Drive, website, or similar)



2. Top 3–5 Picks (VERY IMPORTANT)



Choose your BEST work and include:



For each example:



* The actual file or direct link (image or video)

* What YOU personally did (be specific)

* The goal of the ad

* Why you think it’s a strong creative

* (Optional but preferred) Performance results



This applies to:



* Static ads

* Video ads

* AI-generated creatives



A portfolio alone is NOT enough.

If you do not include your top picks with explanations, your application will NOT be reviewed.



---



**IMPORTANT**



* We are looking for real, thoughtful applications—not copy-paste responses.

* If your application looks like it was written by AI, it will not be considered.

* If your English is not perfect but your message is genuine, that’s completely fine—we prefer authenticity.

* We will provide direction and feedback—your ability to improve matters more than being perfect from day one.



---



**HOW TO APPLY**



Start your application with the word: FOCUS



Applications that do not follow this instruction will be ignored.



---



If you have a real track record and are serious about improving, we want to see your work.

title: Operations & Customer Experience Manager (Shopify)
description:

We receive 20–30 customer
s per day related to tracking, order changes, and returns.

title: Content writer — web hosting & website building
description:
About the role

We are a small content team working across multiple web hosting projects. Our content is read by people who are actively d
 what to buy or build — so accuracy, depth, and clarity matter. You will be writing for different web hosting brands and publications, with the focus for now on producing high-quality editorial and review content in the web hosting and website building space.



What you will do

1. Write 4 articles per week (~2,500 words each) on web hosting, website builders, and related topics

2. Write for different web hosting brands and projects as assigned — tone and style will vary per project

3. Conduct your own research and fact-check all claims before submitting

4. Use AI tools to assist with drafting — but apply your own judgment to verify, enrich, and rewrite the output

5. Follow our editorial style guide and rules: clear, direct writing with no filler or padding. 

6. Self-edit before submission — spelling, grammar, structure, and factual accuracy



What we are looking for

1. Subject matter expertise — You genuinely understand web hosting (shared, VPS, dedicated, cloud), domain management, SSL, website builders, and related concepts. You do not need to look up what cPanel is.

2. AI-assisted writing — You use tools like ChatGPT or Claude to speed up your workflow, but your expertise is the quality filter. You can spot when AI output is vague, wrong, or shallow — and you fix it.

3. Strong written English — Native or near-native fluency. Clean grammar, varied sentence structure, and a natural tone.

4. Attention to detail — You notice inconsistencies, outdated specs, and factual errors. You do not submit work you have not thoroughly reviewed.

5. High conscientiousness — You meet deadlines without being chased. You flag problems early. You take ownership of your output.

6. Clear, no-fluff writing — You write to inform, not to impress. You can follow editorial guidelines and adapt your style to different brand voices.

title: Full Stack Developer
description:
Framesports is a sports video analysis platform. We turn match footage into performance data, coaching insights, player highlight reels, and social content. Our customers range from grassroots clubs through to international unions across the UK, Australia, Southern Africa, and beyond.



We need someone who can own features end-to-end. You'll work across our web platform, shipping improvements that directly affect how coaches, players, and analysts use their data. You'll have genuine input into what gets built and why, reporting directly to the CTO and working closely with the founding team.

This role is fully remote, with a preference for candidates based in South Africa.



What you'll do:

- Build and ship new features across the platform

- Develop and maintain integrations with video platforms, messaging services, and data feeds

- Improve analysis dashboards and data visualisation tools

- Build automated content pipelines for highlight reels, graphics, and match reports

- Work with the founding team to scope, prioritise, and deliver product improvements

- Keep the platform reliable and performant as we scale

- Contribute to technical decisions and architecture



Essential skills we're looking for:

- 4+ years of professional software development experience

- Strong product thinking. You've ideally led or owned small projects from scoping through to delivery

- Comfortable across the full stack, front end and back end

- Able to work independently in a small, distributed team

- Reliable internet and able to overlap with UK hours (at least 4 hours daily)



Nice to have skills we're looking for:

- Ruby on Rails experience

- Familiarity with video processing, sports data, or API integrations

- Experience at an early-stage startup or small company

- Interest in sport



What we offer

- Fully remote with flexible working

- Direct impact on the product and company direction

- Small team, no bureaucracy, fast decisions

- The opportunity to grow with an early-stage company as we scale



How to apply

Send a short note about why this role interests you, along with examples of work you're proud of (GitHub, portfolio, or a brief write-up of a project you owned end-to-end).

title: Amazon Manager
description:
We are looking for an experienced Amazon manager to own the growth and performance of our Amazon channel in the US, UK and Australia.



This role is responsible for driving sales velocity, organic ranking, listing conversion rates, and marketplace visibility across all Amazon products.



The Amazon Manager operates across five core pillars:



a. Conversion Rate Optimization (CVR)

b. Organic Ranking & Keyword Strategy

c. Advertising Strategy Oversight

d. External Traffic Growth

e. Continual learning and improvement



The Amazon Manager does not personally run PPC campaigns, but owns the strategy and performance outcomes, managing the PPC Specialist to ensure profitable growth.



This role requires a highly analytical operator capable of managing experimentation, data analysis, listing optimization, and marketplace growth strategy.



You must have experience managing Amazon accounts in each of the core pillars above.



This role has a base pay, and uncapped performance bonuses.



To apply for this role, please provide answers to the following questions:



1. What training have you gone through for Amazon in particular? Have you done courses? Are you part of networks?



2. How much experience do you have managing Amazon accounts? What size accounts have you managed? Can you give us any references?



3. Provide a brief top-level summary of how you would approach ranking an existing product for keywords.



4. How much experience do you have managing Amazon PPC campaigns?



You must answer these questions to be eligible for this role.



The full job description will be provided to shortlist candidates.

title: Amazon Listing optimization Specialist
description:
We are seeking an experienced Amazon Listing Optimization Specialist to develop a fully optimized product listing from the ground up. This is a project-based role ideal for someone with strong research, copywriting, and conversion optimization skills within the Amazon ecosystem.

The ideal candidate understands how to combine data, psychology, and compelling storytelling to create listings that rank well and convert effectively.

________________________________________

Responsibilities

• Conduct competitive research to identify top-performing listings and market positioning

• Perform in-depth keyword research to identify high-value search terms and ranking opportunities

• Research the product and/or its ingredients, including benefits, use cases, and differentiators

• Analyze existing listings and customer reviews to uncover gaps, buyer pain points, and sentiment trends

• Identify and define unique value propositions (UVPs) that differentiate the product in the marketplace

• Develop a fully optimized Amazon listing, including:

o Product title

o Bullet points

o Product description / A+ content guidance

o Backend keywords (if applicable)

• Write clear, compelling, and conversion-focused copy that aligns with Amazon best practices

• Ensure all content is written in perfect English with strong attention to tone, clarity, and persuasion

________________________________________

Requirements

• Proven experience creating and optimizing Amazon product listings

• Strong understanding of Amazon SEO, keyword indexing, and ranking factors

• Excellent copywriting skills with a focus on conversion

• Ability to interpret customer sentiment and review data

• Experience with tools such as Helium 10, Data Dive, or similar (preferred)

• Detail-oriented with the ability to work independently and meet deadlines

• Native or near-native English proficiency

________________________________________

Deliverables

• Fully optimized Amazon listing (ready to publish)

• Keyword research summary

• Competitor analysis overview

• Clear articulation of product positioning and unique selling points

________________________________________

To Apply

Please include:

• Examples of Amazon listings you have created or optimized

• Brief description of your process

• Estimated turnaround time for a project of this scope

title: Social Media and eCommerce Manager
description:
About Us

nts. From cameras to premium photo prints and memory restoration, everything we do is about helping families live fully and remember what matters.

This role is focused on content creation, product uploads, SEO, and ongoing website improvements — helping turn visitors into customers and keeping our online store active, engaging, and easy to use.

, and other platforms

General Marketing Support

• Assist with campaign setup (e.g. Mother’s Day, Black Friday)

• Suggest improvements to increase engagement and conversions



Requirements

• Experience with Shopify (essential)

• Strong understanding of Instagram Reels / short-form content

• Basic knowledge of SEO (product pages, meta titles/descriptions)

• Good written English (clear, natural tone — not overly corporate)

• Ability to follow systems and execute consistently

• Strong attention to detail



Bonus (Nice to Have)

• Familiarity with Canva, CapCut, or Adobe tools

• Basic understanding of eCommerce conversion strategies



Working Setup

• Remote

• Full Time - must be available for daily checkins

• Must be available for some overlap with Australian business hours



What Success Looks Like

• Consistent flow of engaging content being posted

• New products uploaded accurately and efficiently

• Website feels active, organised, and easy to browse

• Gradual improvement in traffic, engagement, and conversions1. Reel Creation (Core Skill Test)



Application Task (Required)

To be considered for this role, please complete the task below. This helps us understand how you think, create, and execute. Please use our current social posts to understand our branding and tone of voice

Task Overview

You will complete 3 small tasks based on real work you’ll be doing in this role.



Task 1

Create a short-form video (15–30 seconds) using any footage you have (your own or stock).

Theme:

“Why printing your photos matters”

Requirements:

• Add on-screen text/hooks

• Include a clear message/story

• Use captions (subtitles)

• Make it feel natural and engaging (not overly corporate)

Submit as a video file or link



Task 2

Instagram Post (Content + Conversion Test)

Create an Instagram post to promote:

Product: Acrylic Photo Block

Include:

• Image or graphic (can be simple or mockup)

• Caption (engaging + sales-focused)

• Clear hook in the first line

• Call to action

• Optional hashtags

Submit as an image + caption



Task 3

Google Post (Local Marketing Test)

Write a Google Business post for:

Theme: Mother’s Day Photo Gifts

Include:

• Short engaging text (100–150 words)

• Call to action

• Optional emoji use (keep it natural)



What We’re Looking For

• Clear, simple communication (not overcomplicated)

• Understanding of what makes people click, buy, or engage

• Attention to detail

• Ability to execute — not just plan



Important Notes

• Keep it simple — we value clarity over perfection

• Do not use overly generic AI-generated content

• Show us how you think??



Please send your application, along with the completed tasks, to

title: FF&E Coordinator
description:
FF&E Coordinator (Full-Time, Remote)

Hours: Full-Time | 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM EST



About the Role

We are a dynamic and fast-growing company looking for a detail-oriented FF&E Coordinator to support our day-to-day procurement operations. This is an execution-focused role responsible for keeping purchasing, tracking, and vendor coordination running smoothly across multiple active projects.

You'll work directly with our Operations Lead and play a key part in keeping projects organized, on schedule, and within budget. Strong performance in this role leads to increased responsibility and long-term career growth.



What You'll Do

Procurement & Purchasing

Prepare and issue purchase orders for FF&E and OS&E items once selections and budgets are approved

Coordinate pricing, lead times, quantities, and specifications with vendors and manufacturers

Support bid comparisons, quote leveling, and value-engineering efforts

Ensure all purchasing aligns with approved budgets and project requirements



Vendor & Logistics Coordination

Communicate with vendors to confirm production schedules, ship dates, and delivery details

Coordinate shipments to designated warehouses and confirm receipt

Track order status and proactively flag delays or issues

Collect and organize invoices, confirmations, warranties, and related documentation



Budgeting, Tracking & Reporting

Maintain detailed tracking logs for purchase orders, deliveries, and payments

Support budget-to-actual reporting throughout the project lifecycle

Keep all records accurate and up to date in internal tracking systems

Assist with project close-out documentation and final reconciliations



Internal Support & Operations

Work closely with the Operations Lead on daily procurement tasks

Support standardized operating procedures for purchasing, tracking, and reporting

Assist with ad hoc operational tasks as project needs evolve





Tools You'll Use

Fohlio — FF&E specifications, selections, and project documentation

Google Workspace — Sheets, Docs, Drive, Gmail

Notion — internal tracking, documentation, and workflows





What We're Looking For

2–5+ years of experience in procurement, purchasing, or supply chain roles

Experience with FF&E, furniture, hospitality, real estate, or construction-adjacent industries is strongly preferred

Advanced proficiency in Google Sheets / Excel

Experience coordinating with U.S.-based vendors and teams

Highly organized with strong attention to detail and accuracy

Able to manage multiple projects and deadlines simultaneously

Strong written and verbal English communication skills

title: Photo Editing QA and Customer Support
description:
ABOUT REAL TOURS



Real Tours is a fast-growing real estate media company delivering professional photography editing, virtual staging, 3D tours, and listing media to real estate agents and brokers. We pride ourselves on fast turnarounds, exceptional quality, and client relationships that keep agents coming back listing after listing.



ROLE OVERVIEW



We are looking for a versatile QA & Client Support Specialist who can operate across both quality assurance and client-facing support functions. In this hybrid role, you will review edited media for quality before delivery while also serving as a point of contact for client inquiries, re-edit requests, and order updates. This position is ideal for someone who is both a sharp visual reviewer and a confident communicator — someone who understands what great real estate media looks like and can represent that standard to clients.



QUALITY ASSURANCE RESPONSIBILITIES



Review edited real estate photo batches for exposure consistency, color accuracy, sky replacement quality, horizon alignment, and overall presentation

Do virtual staging deliverables for realistic staging, proper scale, material texture, and lighting match to the actual room

Do item removal edits for seamless surface reconstruction with no visible patching or artifacts

Inspecta and create Matterport, Zillow 3D Home, and CubiCasa floor plan and 3D tour

Revise rejected work for clients and their needs

Track and document recurring quality issues to support editor coaching and process improvement



CUSTOMER SUPPORT RESPONSIBILITIES



Serve as a primary point of contact for real estate agent clients via
, Slack, and internal platforms

Communicate order statuses, delivery timelines, and proactively notify clients of any delays

Process re-edit requests and relay precise client feedback to the editing team

Manage client expectations around same-day and next-day delivery SLAs

Escalate unresolved issues or pattern complaints to the appropriate team lead

Support new client onboarding and guide agents through the revision and delivery process



REQUIREMENTS



1+ years of hands-on experience in real estate photo editing, virtual staging, or media post-production — you must be able to identify AND fix common editing issues, not just flag them

Proficient in Adobe Photoshop — able to perform exposure corrections, sky replacements, color grading adjustments, and clean item removals independently when needed

Advanced virtual staging knowledge: understanding of furniture scale, perspective matching, lighting consistency, shadow realism, and material textures

Advanced item removal skills: ability to reconstruct floors, walls, ceilings, and surfaces convincingly with no visible patching, cloning artifacts, or texture mismatches

Familiarity with real estate photo editing standards: sky replacements, virtual staging, item removals, twilight edits, and exposure corrections

Strong written English communication skills — able to write clearly to both clients and editors

Highly self-managed and organized with the ability to juggle QA reviews and open client tickets simultaneously

Experience with Slack, 
, Notion, or similar remote work tools

Comfortable with fast-paced, high-volume workloads and same-day turnaround expectations



NICE TO HAVE



Direct experience with Aryeo, Matterport, CubiCasa, or Zillow 3D Home

Prior work with a real estate photography/media company

Experience with AI editing tools and awareness of AI artifact detection

Background in virtual staging review or advanced retouching QA



TOOLS YOU WILL USE



Adobe Photoshop / Lightroom

Aryeo

Matterport

Zillow 3D Home

CubiCasa

AI Editing Tools

Slack


 / Notion



Work Schedule:

Tuesday - Saturday | 8am - 5pm EST





HOW TO APPLY

To apply, please submit your resume and a brief cover note describing your relevant experience.

Include links to any relevant work samples, portfolios, or past projects where applicable.

description:

We are seeking a talented and experienced Graphic Designer to edit product photos for use in Amazon and online shop listings. Your tasks will include retouching photos, as well as creating and designing graphics & icons. The role is entirely remote, requiring a high-speed internet connection due to the need for efficient uploads and downloads of project files.





Training:

To ensure you're set up for success, we provide an extensive course on editing product photos and designing graphics, created by our team. Watching and learning from this course marks the beginning of our collaboration.





Trial Period:

The first week is a paid trial phase, where you'll go through our course and complete a test project. If the quality meets our standards, we will proceed with a permanent employment offer.





Requirements:

- Must have at least 4 years of work experience as a Graphic Designer

- HIGH level of graphic design skills

- Good Photoshop skills

- Figma skills

- Strong aesthetic sense and design skills

- Good English skills

- Interested in a full-time role (40 hours/week) and looking for long-term employment (years)





How to Apply:

Please submit your application with the subject "Gold-Photo-Candidate" and include a portfolio which includes ACTUAL graphic design outputs and not just photo enhancing ones. Including Amazon listing images you personally designed (no templates) is a PLUS!





Traits We Value:

- Ability to follow clear instructions and processes

- Discipline and determination

- Eagerness to create amazing visuals and push the limits





Benefits:

- Paid time off and paid holidays

- 13th-month pay

- Internal training with exclusive knowledge





Join Us:

If you're passionate about making a significant impact with your photo editing and graphic design skills and are looking for a long-term, fulfilling career, we'd love to hear from you. Apply today to become a part of our success story!

title: Intermediate Level WordPress Developer
description:
About the Role

We are hiring a WordPress Developer with experience in user-centered design, AI-assisted development, CRM integration, workflow automation, and WooCommerce.

We already have a working WordPress website, a live WooCommerce store, and some existing CRM integrations in place. This is not a build-from-scratch role. We need someone who can step in, understand what we have, and take it further — improving the user experience, expanding CRM and automation capabilities, and maintaining what is already running.



Responsibilities

Web Design and User Experience

Review and improve the existing WordPress website with a focus on usability, navigation, and conversion

Apply UX principles such as visual hierarchy, cognitive load management, and common scanning patterns to optimize current page layouts

Ensure responsive, mobile-first performance across devices and browsers

WooCommerce (Existing Store)

Maintain and optimize the existing product pages, checkout flows, and payment/shipping configurations

Troubleshoot store issues and improve performance

AI-Assisted Development

Use AI coding tools such as Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, or similar platforms to support development, debugging, and code generation

Integrate AI-driven features into the website where applicable 

Stay informed on new AI development tools and evaluate them for practical use

CRM Integration — Zoho CRM and GoHighLevel (Expand Existing Setup)

Review and improve existing CRM integrations between WordPress and Zoho CRM and/or GoHighLevel

Expand integration coverage to include additional contacts, deals, pipelines, custom fields, workflows as needed

Knows how to use Zapier, Make, Pabbly, or n8n to connect WordPress with CRM

Troubleshoot and resolve issues with current integrations

Custom WordPress Development

Build or customize themes using block-based, Full Site Editing, or classic theme approaches

Write backend logic in PHP using WordPress hooks, actions, filters, and the REST API

Create custom post types, taxonomies, meta boxes, and advanced field configurations



Requirements

2–3+ years of WordPress development experience (themes, plugins, and full-stack builds)

WooCommerce experience including store customization, custom extensions, and performance optimization

Understanding of UX design principles and how user behavior applies to web page layouts

Hands-on experience with AI coding tools such as Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, or equivalent

Experience working with Zoho CRM and/or GoHighLevel integrations (contacts, deals, pipelines, webhooks)

Working knowledge of at least one of: Zapier, Make, Pabbly, n8n

Proficiency in PHP, JavaScript, HTML.

Comfortable inheriting and improving existing codebases and integrations



What We Offer

Flexible schedule — work when you're most creative, no time tracker, no micromanagement

A collaborative team that values creative input and fresh ideas

Access to AI tools and a professional development budget

Competitive compensation based on experience

A supportive team environment where asking questions is encouraged

Manageable workload with clear priorities — we focus on one thing at a time, not everything at once

Hands-on guidance and clear direction from the team — you will not be left to figure everything out alone

Ready to Apply?



I'd love to see what you can create! To help me understand if we're a great fit, please share the following:



1. Your DISC test - Take it here -

p?minutes=0.5&textfile=0&mode=sent&result_url=
