title: Senior Direct Response Copywriter & Editor — Ads, Emails, Video Scripts
description:
We're hiring a world-class direct response copywriter and editor to own the words across our entire marketing output — video scripts, Meta and TikTok ad copy,
 sequences, SMS, landing pages, and sales pages. This is a role for someone who takes copy seriously as a craft and can sell like a professional, not just write like one.



You'll be the person who makes sure every word that leaves our business pulls its weight. That means writing original campaigns from scratch, editing and elevating existing copy from our team, stress-testing every hook and CTA, and being the quality bar for everything we put into the world.



What you'll actually do day-to-day: Write ad scripts and hooks for paid social (Meta, TikTok, YouTube). Build
 flows and broadcast campaigns that convert. Write landing pages and sales pages that hold attention. Edit and sharpen copy written by other tea
mbers. Audit existing campaigns and flag what's underperforming. Study our offers, customers, and category deeply enough to write like an insider.



Who we're looking for: Native-level or near-native written English — you should be able to write copy that an American or Australian reader can't tell wasn't written by a local. A clear track record in direct response, not just general content or corporate copywriting. Experience writing for ecommerce, coaching, info products, or DTC brands. Obsessive attention to detail — you catch typos, logic gaps, weak CTAs, and lazy writing that others miss. Fast turnaround without sacrificing quality.



Nice to have: Experience with Klaviyo or similar ESPs. Comfort with Google Docs, Notion, and Slack. Basic understanding of CRO and funnel metrics so you can tie copy to conversion data.



How to apply:

Start your application with the word "Persuade" as the first word of your message so we know you read this properly — applications without it are deleted unread.

In your message, include:



Two to three samples of direct response work you've written (ads,
s, or sales pages — not blog posts or corporate content).

A short paragraph breaking down one ad or
 you've seen recently that you thought was excellent, and why.

Your monthly salary expectation.

Your availability to start.



This is only for professional copyrighters, please do not apply if this doesn't sound like you

title: Photo and Video editor (General Dropshipping / Meta Ads)
description:
Company Description

We are a young, fast growing general dropshipping company focused on testing and scaling winning products across multiple markets. We operate in different niches within health and wellness and run performance driven advertising on Meta
 and Instagram.

Our team is small, ambitious and moves fast. We focus on testing, scaling and results, not fluff. We are looking for a Photo and Video Editor who does not just edit, but understands what makes ads convert in a fast paced general dropshipping environment.



Job Description

As our Photo and Video Editor, you will be responsible for producing high converting ad creatives, both video and static, for Meta platforms. You will work directly with the founders and business manager to bring new concepts to life quickly, test them and scale what works. You understand what makes ads convert and you can produce it fast, consistently and at scale.

You are not just an editor, you think like a creative strategist. You come up with new angles, identify what is working and proactively build on winning concepts. You actively look for new ideas, variations and improvements without needing constant direction.



Responsibilities

Your role includes creating short form video ads for
 and Instagram using 
, Veed and AI tools, editing static image ads using Canva and similar tools, and producing multiple creative variants per product based on different hooks, angles and briefs. You work with high performing formats such as before and after, testimonial and hook based creatives while following a daily testing rhythm where consistent output is key.



You develop new creative angles independently based on product research, competitor ads and market insights. You actively search for inspiration using tools such as Ads Library and Afterlib, and turn those insights into new creatives. You identify winning creatives and create multiple variations based on what performs best, continuously iterating on hooks, structures and concepts. You track creatives and results using Google Sheets and continuously improve based on performance data.



What We Expect From You

- Proven experience creating both video and static ads for Meta

- E commerce experience is required

- Strong ability to take initiative and work independently without constant guidance

- You actively search for new angles and ideas using tools like Ads Library and Afterlib

- Ability to create variations based on existing winning ads and scale what works

- Strong understanding of hooks, pacing and what makes creatives convert

- Experience with CapCut, Veed, Canva and AI creative tools

- Comfortable working with Google Sheets to track creatives and performance

- You know how to use AI tools such as ChatGPT, Claude or similar to improve speed, generate ideas and optimize creatives

- Consistent output and ability to work in a daily testing environment

- Clear and proactive communication with the team

- Ownership mindset, you take responsibility and suggest improvements



Expectations

This is a part time role of around 25 to 35 hours per week, approximately 5 to 7 hours per day. Consistent daily availability is preferred due to our testing rhythm. The position is remote with flexible working hours, and you will be part of a small, high performance team with direct access to decision makers.



After an initial onboarding period, there is a clear opportunity for salary growth based on performance, consistency and level of independence. Strong performers who take ownership and deliver consistent output can grow quickly within the role. Performance based bonuses are also provided based on results and contribution.

This is a long term opportunity with room to grow as the business scales.



Application

To apply, send your portfolio with a focus on Meta ad creatives, include two to three examples of ads you have made that performed well, and if possible include metrics such as CTR, CPA or ROAS. Also include a short explanation of how you come up with new creative angles.



If you understand performance, think in winning creatives and can execute fast, we want to hear from you. Apply now and let us build something great together!

title: Part-Time GoHighLevel Technical VA / Right Hand (Remote, PH-Based)
description:
About the Role

I am looking for a highly reliable, tech-focused Virtual Assistant who is strong in GoHighLevel and backend systems to become my right hand as I scale multiple projects and operations. This is a part-time, backend-focused role (not client-facing) with the potential to grow into a long-term, higher-level position for the right person.



What You’ll Do

You will support me directly and focus heavily on GoHighLevel and related technical tasks, with some general VA responsibilities as needed.



GoHighLevel & Tech Responsibilities

- Build, optimize, and maintain workflows, automations, and triggers inside GoHighLevel.

- Configure pipelines, opportunities, tags, and custom fields to match business processes.

- Set up and manage calendars, booking links, and notifications (SMS,
, call workflows).

- Implement and maintain webhooks, APIs, and integrations using tools like Zapier or Make.

- Connect and manage Google integrations (Gmail, Calendar, etc.).

- Assist with SaaS mode, snapshots, and multi-account management (cloning setups, deployments, etc.).

- Set up and manage payment integrations and automation tied to billing and subscriptions.

- Use AI tools (e.g., for workflow logic, SOP drafting, QA checks) to speed up builds and implementation.

- Troubleshoot issues inside GHL and related integrations and propose fixes.

(Note: I already have a designer; this role is primarily backend/operations-focused rather than design-heavy.)



VA / Operations Support

- Help translate my ideas and instructions into clear tasks, systems, and workflows.

- Document systems and processes (SOPs, checklists, Loom videos, etc.).

- Keep task lists organized, follow up on priorities, and help ensure nothing falls through the cracks.

- Perform various tech-related admin tasks as assigned (account setups, simple research, light data cleanup, etc.).



What Success Looks Like

- GoHighLevel accounts are clean, organized, and running on reliable automations with minimal errors.

- Manual, repetitive tasks are reduced through automation and better system design.

- My workload is lighter because you can take ownership of technical tasks with minimal supervision.

- Systems and processes are documented clearly so they can be repeated or handed off.



Requirements

- At least 2+ years of hands-on GoHighLevel experience (workflows, triggers, pipelines, calendars, basic funnels).

- Proven experience managing automations and integrations (Zapier, Make, or similar tools).

- Comfortable setting up and troubleshooting:

--Workflows, triggers, and automations

--Calendars and scheduling systems

--SMS and
 notifications

--Webhooks and basic API-based connections

- Strong general tech skills and willingness to learn new tools quickly.

- Experience as a VA, tech support, or operations assistant is a big plus.

- Highly detail-oriented, organized, and proactive in spotting issues and suggesting improvements.

- Strong written English for documentation and internal communication.

- Reliable internet connection (at least 25–50 Mbps) and a quiet work environment.

- Able to work evening hours PH time (some overlap with 5 PM – 1 AM Manila time preferred) and be responsive during agreed hours.



Bonus / Nice-to-Have

- Experience working with digital marketing agencies or online businesses.

- Familiarity with Twilio or other SMS/call providers and call tracking/lead routing systems.

- Basic understanding of funnels and landing pages inside GHL (no heavy design required).

- Experience using AI tools (ChatGPT/Claude/etc.) to speed up system building, documentation, and QA.



Work Schedule & Type

- Part-time to start (around 15–20 hours per week), with potential to increase hours as we grow.

- Long-term role for the right person who can become my trusted technical right hand.

- Fully remote, PH-based only (this will be posted on OnlineJobs.ph).



Compensation & Benefits

- Competitive hourly rate based on experience and skill level.

- Opportunity for rate increases and performance-based bonuses as you take on more responsibility and deliver results.

- Paid time off and holidays can be added over time for long-term tea
mbers.

- Ongoing training, mentoring, and upskilling opportunities in GoHighLevel, automation, and backend systems.

(We can discuss exact compensation and benefits during the interview, based on your experience and performance.)



How to Apply

If this sounds like the right role for you, please apply via OnlineJobs.ph AND send an
 with the subject line:

Subject: GHL Technical VA – [Your Full Name]



Include the following:

- Your resume or OnlineJobs.ph profile link.

- A short introduction about yourself and your relevant experience.

- Examples of GoHighLevel systems you’ve built, including:

--Type of workflow/automation

--What problem it solved

--Any results or performance improvements (if available)

--Details of any integrations you’ve set up (Zapier/Make, webhooks, payment integrations, Google, Twilio, etc.).

--Any SOPs or documentation samples you can share (links or brief descriptions).

--Your available working hours (PH time) and your internet speed (include a recent speedtest link).



Final Note

This role is for builders, problem-solvers, and system thinkers who want to grow with a fast-moving business. If you love working inside GoHighLevel, enjoy figuring out how to automate and improve systems, and want to become a trusted right hand rather than “just a VA,” I’d love to hear from you.

title: Social Media Manager
description:
HOW TO APPLY

If this opportunity feels like the perfect fit for you and you meet the job qualifications, we invite you to learn more about our HiEnd Accents team in the Philippines and submit your application here: 
/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagHKo8CnRtRpX585/form



Please note: Only applications submitted via this link will be considered.



Job Description



We are looking for an experienced, passionate, and creative Social Media Manager to join our team! As our Social Media Manager, you will be responsible for implementing our Social Media strategy in order to increase our online presence and strengthen our relationship with our customers and fans. You will be working closely with our Senior Social Media Manager and the remainder of our Marketing department. The platforms that you’ll primarily work on and be responsible for are (1) Instagram, (2)
, and (3) Pinterest. As our Social Media Manager, you will have a meaningful impact on our growth, bottom line, and brand identity in an exciting, design-driven company where being creative is just as important as being analytical.



The ideal candidate excels in building relationships, is passionate about social media and interior design, is a strong writer with a keen visual eye, and thrives on performance-driven teams.



We are looking for a long-term tea
mber who will stay and grow at our company. We offer competitive compensation, a good and stable work environment, and plenty of growth opportunities.



PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITIES



Content Development:



- In partnership with our Senior Social Media Manager and Marketing Team, create and maintain a social media content calendar that supports primary brand stories and goals while also tapping into seasonal 
nts and appropriate trends

- Create original, on-brand social media content that our followers will appreciate

- Content will be a mix of product-related content as well as product-adjacent content (e.g., top sleep tips!)

- Leveraging data, identify UGC and inspiration imagery to be considered for posting

- Write effective content. Work with copywriters and designers to ensure content is informative and appealing

- Keep up to date with current news, pausing content and escalating to leadership where appropriate

- Partner with Marketing and eComm tea
mbers to create shot lists for social media, as needed

- Develop Instagram Stories templates and stickers. Using those templates and Instagram platform elements, create our Instagram Stories



Posting:



- Schedule content for
, Instagram feed, Instagram Stories, and Pinterest, either within the app or by using tools such as Sprout Social or Later

- Post Instagram Stories directly from the Instagram app



Affiliate Marketing & Community Management



- Respond to all engagement and direct messages within 24 hours on weekdays

- Respond to all urgent engagement and direct messages within 24 hours on weekends

- Respond to engagement during normal US hours (range of acceptable times: 10 pm PH - 9 am PH)

- Author thoughtful, individualized comments and messages in the brand voice in response to comments on our pages, on images where we are tagged or where our product is depicted, and on images posted by brands and people we admire!

- Develop and maintain a live document with common questions and responses

- Adhere to rules and regulations - **no “black hat” social media techniques**! We want to build our brand presence organically



Asset Collection



- Request and gather UGC from our followers and fans in our Airtable database. Request content usage permission for all images that are within our brand guidelines. Follow up via
 or direct message as needed for any assets we are especially eager to share.

- Obtain or verify permissions for any images submitted via direct message,
, influencer collaborations or other means and upload to our visual curation tool, editing beforehand as needed.

- With brand priorities in mind, investigate content leads identified by social media, press, and other means to create a library of aspirational imagery featuring our products



Influencer Marketing



- Identify influencers who we can work with as part of our influencer marketing strategy

- Execute on influencer marketing strategy and management, including cultivating our network of valued influencer partners



Reporting & Strategy



- Assist in regular content performance and competitive reporting and analysis

- Provide ad hoc qualitative social analysis

- Be our in-house expert on social platform updates and trends in social media, interior design, home, and retail, presenting out to the team as needed

- Continuously seek ways to improve processes, recommending any tools or technology needed and subsequently serving as the primary point of contact for the relevant third parties

- Ideate new social activations, such as content series, engagement strategies, contests, and giveaways



About HiEnd Accents



HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding and linens, sheeting, decorative pillows and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate our customers' lives via beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value.



As a family-owned business, we’re committed to personal service and long-term relationships. Through our four brands, we offer unique designs across a spectrum of styles and price points, all united by exceptional value. Combined with our customer-first approach, prompt shipping and low order minimums, we’ve become the preferred bedding supplier for thousands of top department stores, furniture retailers, interior designers, and boutique hotels nationwide. Recently recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing businesses in the US, we continue to innovate and expand our reach in the home textiles market.



Discover more about us and our brands at 



Why HiEnd Accents?



At HiEnd Accents, we're a close-knit team driven by entrepreneurial spirit, growth mindset, and a shared commitment to excellence. Our collaborative approach has propelled us to new heights – we're proud to be recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing small companies in the United States. This achievement is a testament to our team's dedication and the exciting opportunities ahead. If you thrive in a vibrant, high-paced culture where your contributions truly matter, we want to hear from you!



Working at HiEnd Accents means that you can expect the following:



-Competitive Compensation - We offer a highly competitive compensation package, including 13th Month Pay

-Professional Growth - We invest in our people and make sure that they have the opportunity to learn, grow and develop their careers continuously

-Great Team of Like-Minded Professionals - We prioritize hiring based on culture and values, so you’re working with a team of folks who are as fun, talented, and committed as you are

title: CAD Drafter SHOP DRAWINGS
description:
Virtual Assistant (VA) -Cabinet CAD Drafter & Rendering Specialist



Position Overview

We are seeking a detail-oriented and highly organized Virtual Assistant with experience in cabinet drafting and light rendering. This role supports our cabinet/millwork operations by producing accurate shop drawings, assisting with design visualization, and helping translate concepts into production-ready outputs.

This position is ideal for someone who understands cabinetry construction, thrives in a structured environment, and can execute with precision and speed.

Core Responsibilities

1. Shop Drawings (Primary Function)

• Create detailed cabinet shop drawings from sketches, plans, or markups 

• Produce plan, elevation, section, and detail views as required 

• Ensure drawings are accurate, dimensioned, and production-ready 

• Revise drawings based on internal or client feedback 

• Maintain drawing standards and version control 

2. CAD Drafting & Layout

• Develop layouts for kitchens, closets, and custom millwork 

• Interpret architectural plans and field measurements 

• Apply standard cabinet construction methods (face frame, frameless, etc.) 

• Ensure alignment with materials, hardware, and build requirements 

3. Basic Renderings (Secondary Function)

• Create simple 3D renderings for client visualization 

• Apply materials, finishes, and basic lighting 

• Support sales/design team with quick-turn visuals (not high-end photorealistic work) 

4. Production Support

• Assist in preparing cut lists or material takeoffs (if capable) 

• Coordinate drawing updates with project management systems (e.g., JobTread) 

• Organize files and maintain clean digital records 

• Support estimating and design team with revisions and updates 





Required Skills & Experience

• Proficiency in at least one CAD/design software: 

o AutoCAD, SketchUp, Cabinet Vision, or similar 

• Experience creating cabinet or millwork shop drawings 

• Strong understanding of: 

o Cabinet construction methods 

o Materials and hardware basics 

o Dimensioning and drafting standards 

• Ability to read and interpret architectural drawings 

• High attention to detail and accuracy 

Work Structure & Expectations

• Fully remote (Virtual Assistant role) 

• Must be responsive during agreed working hours 

• Ability to handle multiple projects and deadlines 

• Turnaround expectations: 

o Initial drawings: 24–72 hours depending on scope 

o Revisions: 24 hours 

Success Profile (What Success Looks Like)

• Drawings require minimal revisions 

• Clear, clean, and consistent output 

• Strong communication and proactive follow-up 

• Ability to move from concept to production without confusion 

• Reliable, organized, and accountable 

Compensation

• Hourly or per-project (based on experience) 

• Opportunity for consistent, long-term work based on performance



**Previous cabinetry shop drawing creation in AutoCad is required, preferably US based experience**

title: Customer Support Specialist
description:
Customer Support Specialist

Full-Time Contractor · Remote · 4–5h CET overlap required



ABOUT US

We run Strategic Parenting, Althea Academy, and ADHD Parenting, free world-class online summits and digital products (courses, coaching programs, ebooks, and communities) that make expert knowledge accessible to parents, neurodivergent adults, and families worldwide.

We move fast, care deeply about our audience, and hold a high bar for warmth and polish in every customer interaction.



>> The Role

You'll be the friendly, reliable voice behind the inbox. Responding to customers across three brands, resolving payment issues, moderating reviews and social comments, and keeping our backend humming. You won't be on your own: you'll work directly with our Customer Support Project Manager, with a clear path to a Customer Support Manager role as you grow with us.



>> What You'll Do

-
 correspondence across all three brands (urgent replies within a couple of hours; same-day for the rest)

- Handle PayPal & Stripe cases  (disputes, refunds, chargebacks)

- Moderate Trustpilot reviews and social comments on
 & Instagram

- Process refunds and keep spam folders clean

- Maintain and update support templates

- Weekly, monthly, and ad-hoc admin (uploading files, uploading courses, light backend tasks)

- Proactively spot friction and suggest fixes (this is how you grow with us)



>> Who You Are

- 3+ years in a similar customer support role serving an English-speaking audience

- Fluent English (C1+), written and spoken (most work is written, but you'll join tea
etings with us)

- Fast, accurate typist with excellent written communication

- Experienced with CRMs and e-commerce/automation tools- we use HelpScout, Zendesk, WooCommerce, and ActiveCampaign; experience with similar platforms is fine

- Highly skilled with Google Workspace (Gmail, Docs, Sheets, Drive)

- Proactive and detail-obsessed (you spot problems before we do)

- Available 8 hours/day, 40 hours/week, with at least 4–5 hours of daily overlap with Central European Time



>> Nice to Have

- Familiarity with Asana

- Hands-on experience with Stripe and PayPal dispute flows

- Comfort moderating on
 and Instagram



>> Please don't apply if…

You've never held a customer support role for an English-speaking audience

You can't commit to 8 hours/day, 40 hours/week (no part-time)

Your timezone has zero overlap with working offices in Central European Time

You need constant hand-holding (we’re looking for proactive operators)



>> Start Date

Immediate.



>> How to Apply

We value your time, so we've designed an online form to get straight to the point.

Please fill out THIS APPLICATION FORM.



>>>> When answering the last question in the form, start your answer with "Tangerine."



P.S. We will not review the applications that are NOT submitted through the Application form: 
. Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a short test assignment (~1 hour of work). Please confirm in the form whether you're open to it.



Best of luck, hope to meet you soon!



>> APPLY HERE:

title: Executive Assistant to the CEO
description:
ROLE OVERVIEW

The Executive Assistant to the CEO is a high-trust, high-impact role supporting the CEO of SmarTech. This position goes beyond traditional administrative support and plays a critical role in project coordination, operational follow-through, and executive leverage. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in structured chaos, can manage priorities across multiple initiatives, and ensures that important work moves forward without friction or bottlenecks.





SUCCESS IN THIS ROLE

Proactively identifies gaps, risks, and follow-ups before escalation

Keeps the CEO organized, informed, and focused on high-impact priorities

Ensures internal initiatives, projects, and partnerships move forward smoothly

Acts as a reliable execution partner in a fast-paced leadership environment





KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Executive & Strategic Support

Manage calendars, meetings, and priorities for the CEO

Handle executive inbox management and draft professional communications

Prepare meeting agendas, briefs, and follow-up action items

Support organization of strategic initiatives and leadership priorities



Project Management & Operations

Track deadlines, dependencies, and deliverables across multiple projects

Ensure urgent and high-priority tasks are surfaced and completed on time

Follow up with internal tea
mbers and external partners to unblock work



Cross-Functional Coordination

Support coordination across operations, revenue initiatives, and partnerships

Assist with internal alignment and external communications as needed

Prepare reports, summaries, and documentation for leadership review



Sales & Growth Support

Assist with proposal coordination, pipeline tracking, and CRM-related tasks

Ensure follow-ups and commitments tied to growth initiatives are executed



Virtual Meeting & Documentation Support

Prepare agendas and materials for internal and external meetings

Take detailed notes and document action items

Track ownership and follow-ups post-meeting



Confidentiality & Trust

Handle sensitive information with discretion and professionalism

REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS & SKILLS

2+ years supporting senior executives or leadership teams (U.S.-based preferred)

Strong CRM and project management experience (Asana, 
, Hubspot, etc.)

Exceptional written and verbal English communication skills

Strong organizational skills and ability to manage competing priorities

High attention to detail and consistent follow-through

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

Background in operations, marketing, sales operations, or business support

Experience supporting CEOs, founders, or senior executives

Experience coordinating across internal teams and external partners





COMPENSATION

Competitive PH-based compensation, commensurate with experience - $800 - $1000

WHY JOIN SMARTECH

Work directly with the CEO at the center of company strategy and growth

title: Paid Media Account Analyst
description:
ROLE SUMMARY

The Paid Media Account Analyst is a skilled digital marketing professional with 2+ years of hands-on paid ads experience. This role centers on tactical implementation, managing and optimizing multi-channel campaigns across platforms like Google Ads, Meta, LinkedIn, and programmatic. Account Analysts are expected to take full ownership of campaign execution and performance, confidently managing the day-to-day health of their accounts with minimal oversight. While they collaborate with Senior Account Analysts and Account Managers to shape broader strategy, they are accountable for translating those plans into results. They also play a key role in supporting junior analysts by offering mentorship, feedback, and tactical guidance.



Ideal candidates should be comfortable analyzing performance data, identifying optimization opportunities, and executing media strategies with precision. They should have a solid understanding of cross-channel and full-funnel marketing, enabling them to connect tactical execution with broader client goals. Effective collaboration with account managers and other analysts is essential, as is the ability to clearly communicate results, insights, and tactical recommendations to internal teams.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



Campaign Management & Optimization

Build, manage, and optimize paid media campaigns (Google Ads, Meta, LinkedIn, Programmatic) independently and with the guidance of senior tea
mbers.

Conduct regular performance analysis, making adjustments to budgets, bids, and targeting to meet KPIs.

Ensure campaigns consistently align with client objectives and strategic guidelines.

Leverage cross-channel insights to optimize the customer journey and maximize ROAS.



Strategic Support & Insight Generation

Execute tactical plans based on strategic guidance from senior analysts and strategists.

Analyze performance data to identify short-term optimization opportunities and tactical improvements.

Provide platform-specific recommendations to enhance campaign performance within established strategic frameworks.



Quality Assurance & Accuracy

Conduct thorough quality assurance checks on campaigns, ensuring correct implementation of tracking and budgets.

Maintain high accuracy and attention to detail across all deliverables.

Correct and proactively address any issues before client delivery.



Team Collaboration & Mentorship

Support junior analysts with tactical execution and platform best practices.

Contribute to onboarding and training initiatives, sharing tactical knowledge regularly.

Foster a collaborative, execution-focused team environment that emphasizes precision and efficiency.



Cross-Functional Communication

Work closely with Account Managers and cross-functional teams to execute campaign tactics effectively.

Clearly communicate performance insights, tactical updates, and optimization recommendations to internal stakeholders.

Participate in client calls when necessary to provide tactical support and platform insights.



Process Improvement & Continuous Learning

Stay current on industry trends, new platform features, and optimization techniques.

Evaluate and test new tools and methodologies to improve campaign performance.

Share insights and learnings with the broader team to enhance collective knowledge.



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS & SKILLS

2+ years of hands-on experience managing multi-platform paid media campaigns (Google Ads, Meta, LinkedIn, programmatic).

Strong grasp of campaign optimization, budget management, and platform-specific best practices.

Strong analytical skills with experience interpreting complex data sets.

Exceptional attention to detail and organizational skills.

Excellent communication and collaboration abilities.

Proficiency with communication and project management tools (Asana and Slack).



PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS & SKILLS

3+ years of hands-on experience managing multi-platform paid media campaigns (Google Ads, Meta, LinkedIn, programmatic).

Experience managing mid-level accounts or diverse client portfolios across multiple industries.

Proven track record of supporting junior analysts and contributing to team growth.

Certifications such as Google Ads and Meta Blueprint.

Familiarity with niche and growing ad platforms (e.g., Reddit, TikTok, Criteo) or advanced programmatic tools.

title: Senior PPC Account Manager
description:
ROLE SUMMARY



The Account Manager (AM) is a client-facing role responsible for supporting day-to-day success across a portfolio of marketing accounts. AMs work closely with internal teams to keep projects moving, ensure the timely delivery of campaigns and assets, and maintain strong client communication. They act as the central point of coordination, translating client needs into actionable internal tasks, and ensuring updates, follow-ups, and reporting are clear and accurate.



While strategic planning is typically owned in collaboration with Analysts, AMs must have a solid understanding of marketing fundamentals and be comfortable discussing performance results and project objectives. Success in this role requires strong communication, task management skills, and a proactive mindset to keep clients informed and engaged.



AMs are expected to use Slack and Asana regularly to manage projects, collaborate with teams, and communicate with clients. This role is ideal for professionals with marketing exposure and a strong client service foundation who are ready to take the lead on execution and client relationship management.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



Client Communication & Relationship Management

Act as the day-to-day contact for assigned clients, ensuring timely responses and clear updates.

Lead recurring client calls, prepare agendas, and document action items and outcomes both internally and externally.

Deliver follow-ups, meeting recaps, and task updates to clients and internal teams using Slack,
, and Asana.

Build rapport with clients and understand their preferences, communication style, and working cadence.



Project Coordination & Task Management

Translate client requests into detailed tasks, coordinating with Analysts, Creative, and SEO teams as needed.

Own the flow of projects in Asana—setting due dates, assigning tasks, and following up on progress.

Ensure timelines are met and deliverables meet quality standards before going to the client.

Help keep clients accountable for reviews, feedback, and asset delivery.



Marketing Strategy & Performance Analysis

Understand core marketing metrics and KPIs to speak confidently about campaign trends.

Collaborate with Analysts to prepare insights and recommendations and present them clearly in client-facing updates.

Support campaign planning and optimizations by identifying strategic priorities linked to client goals.

Use tools like TapClicks and GA4 to interpret data and translate results into client-friendly updates.



Account Growth & Retention

Spot growth opportunities through performance review, client feedback, or shifting business needs.

Collaborate with internal leads to scope and pitch upsells or service expansions.

Monitor account health, flag potential churn risks early, and collaborate internally to develop 



Team Collaboration & Internal Best Practices

Work closely with Analysts, SEO, Creative, and leadership to deliver a seamless client experience.

Adhere to SOPs and workflows, maintaining high standards for delivery and communication.

Contribute to process improvement efforts, template development, and mentorship of newer tea
mbers when applicable



Process Improvement & Continuous Learning

Stay current on industry trends, new platform features, and optimization techniques.

Evaluate and test new tools and methodologies to improve campaign performance.

Proactively contribute to improving internal processes, workflow efficiency, and overall team effectiveness.

Share insights and learnings with the broader team to enhance collective knowledge.



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS & SKILLS



2+ years of experience in a client-facing role, ideally within a marketing agency or digital advertising environment.

Proven success managing accounts, particularly those involving paid media or multi-channel campaigns.

Strong communication skills, including writing client
s and presenting updates in meetings.

Familiarity with Asana (or other PM tools), Slack, and marketing performance dashboards.

Solid understanding of digital marketing channels (e.g., Google Ads, Meta) and common KPIs.

Organized and detail-oriented, with the ability to manage multiple accounts and timelines simultaneously.

Collaborative mindset and a willingness to ask questions, flag issues, and support team execution.



PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS & SKILLS



3+ years of experience in an agency or client services role.

Exposure to multi-channel campaign delivery or account management.

Experience working closely with creative teams, analysts, or technical stakeholders.

Familiarity with Google Analytics, CRM tools (e.g., HubSpot), or conversion tracking.



WHY JOIN US?



Competitive salary and performance-based bonuses

Unlimited PTO (Responsible PTO – take the time you need, with the expectation that it aligns with client commitments and team goals)

Flexible, remote-first work environment

Professional development opportunities

Collaborative, growth-focused culture

title: Intake Admin
description:
Job Title: Intake Admin (Overseas Hire) 

Location: Remote

Type: Independent Contractor (Full-time)



About Full Service Pros

Full Service Pros (FSP) is a U.S.-based company supporting restoration and rebuild operations through effective back-office, HR, and client intake services. We are currently seeking a highly organized and client-focused Intake Coordinating Specialist to join our growing intake team. This position is remote and ideal for an independent overseas professional with strong communication and coordination skills.



Working Hours

9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST, Monday to Friday

Full-time commitment required.



Technical Requirements

• Minimum 2 years of experience in client intake, case coordination, or administrative support (preferably in restoration, insurance, or service industries).

• Strong proficiency in CRM systems, Google Workspace, and Microsoft Office.

• Demonstrated ability to manage sensitive client information with confidentiality.

• Excellent organizational and multitasking skills.



Basic Skills & Attributes

• Strong verbal and written communication skills.

• Professional, reliable, and detail-oriented.

• Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.

• Highly organized with strong follow-up discipline.

Key Duties & Responsibilities

Non-Negotiables

Application Instructions

• Professional references (if available).



Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the next stage of the selection process. We appreciate your interest in joining Full Service Pros.

title: Cold Calling Specialist
description:
Real Estate Cold Calling Specialist



(Sales Role – Not Customer Support)



TYPE: Full-Time

LOCATION: Remote (EST hours)

HOURS: 40 hours/week

START: Immediate (within 7 days)



JOB OVERVIEW



This is a serious outbound SALES role, not call center work and not general VA work.

We are a U.S.-based real estate investment firm hiring full-time cold callers to generate motivated seller leads.



This role is NOT for:



– Call center reps

– Customer service agents

– Part-time callers

– Appointment setters

– Freelancers juggling multiple clients



WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:



– Full-time outbound cold calling experience (real estate is a plus, not required)

– Confident, persuasive, and professional phone skills

– Experience working with multi-line dialer systems and CRM platforms to track leads, notes, and follow-ups

– Strong work ethic and resilience

– Coachable mindset and long-term commitment



REQUIREMENTS:



– Fluent English (accent OK, must be very clear)

– Quiet professional workspace

– High-quality headset + stable internet

– Full-time availability (Mon–Fri, 40 hrs/week, EST)



DAILY RESPONSIBILITIES:



– High-volume outbound cold calling to property owners

– Follow proven scripts and objection handling

– Qualify motivated sellers

– Enter accurate notes, tags, and follow-ups into CRM

– Send SMS follow-ups to cold or unresponsive leads



WHY JOIN US:

title: WANTED! The World’s Best Short-Form Video Editor (Remote)
description:
$7 to $10/hour (full-time)



When you apply, use this exact subject line:

“I actually read the instructions”



Who we are:

BluePrint Cabinets is building a content machine.



We document real installs, real transformations, and real behind-the-scenes work — then turn that into simple, high-volume content that builds trust and drives attention.



We are not chasing trends.

We are building consistency at scale.



Speed matters.

Output matters.

Details matter more than anything.



If you take pride in clean, sharp edits and hate sloppy work, you’ll fit here.



If you rush and miss things, you won’t last.



What we’re looking for

We need a full-time video editor who can take organized footage and turn it into clean, engaging short-form content — fast.



This is a production role, not a creative playground.



Your job is to produce high-quality reels every single day without sacrificing attention to detail.



You will not be judged on effort.

You will be judged on output.



Expected output:



* 3 to 5+ reels per day

* Consistent quality across all videos

* Minimal revisions once trained



You’ll be:



* Editing short-form content

* Adding accurate subtitles

* Cleaning up pacing and dead space

* Cutting out filler, awkward pauses, and mistakes

* Clipping from longer-form videos

* Adding intros/outros

* Occasionally improving hooks when obvious



Key Responsibilities



* Deliver 3 to 5+ completed reels per day

* Same-day or next-day turnaround

* Follow a clear editing system

* Maintain quality without constant feedback

* Communicate clearly and hit deadlines



Quality Standard (non-negotiable)



Details are everything in this role.



These are immediate red flags:



* Misspelled subtitles

* Subtitles that don’t match audio exactly

* Poor timing or lag in captions

* Leaving in filler words, dead air, or sloppy cuts

* Audio that feels messy or unclean



If these issues show up consistently, you will not pass the trial period.



Qualifications, Skills, and Experience



* Experience editing short-form content (Reels/TikTok)

* Comfortable using CapCut, Submagic, or similar tools

* Basic understanding of hooks and what keeps attention in the first 3 seconds

* Strong attention to detail

* Fast and reliable

* Able to follow instructions and improve quickly



Compensation & Growth

Starts at $7 to $10/hour (full-time)



You will be evaluated on:



* Daily output (3–5 reels)

* Quality (accuracy, pacing, cleanliness)

* Consistency

* Reliability



If you prove:



* You hit output targets consistently

* Your edits require minimal corrections

* You take ownership and improve



You will get:



* More responsibility

* Long-term stability

* Growth inside the company



We reward people who execute, not people who talk.



Successful Editor Profile

You are:



* Fast and consistent

* Detail-obsessed

* Easy to communicate with

* Someone who notices small mistakes before anyone else does



You enjoy:



* Tight, clean edits

* Fixing messy footage

* Repetition and getting faster over time

* Making small improvements that compound



Make sure you’re comfortable with:



* Producing 3–5+ videos every day

* Repetitive, high-volume work

* Fast turnaround expectations

* Direct feedback

* Remote communication



Our values



* Speed wins

* Consistency compounds

* Details matter

* Ownership over excuses



To apply (read carefully — this is part of the test)

If you miss instructions, your application will not be reviewed.



Step 1 —

Send your application to: 



Subject line must be EXACTLY:

I actually read the instructions



Step 2 

Send exactly 3 or more short-form videos you’ve edited.



Step 3 — Loom or similar video recording (max 2 minutes)



Answer:



* What makes a video feel engaging in the first 3 seconds?

* What’s one small edit that improves almost every video?

* What’s your favorite part about editing reels?



In your Loom, say the word “Blueprint” once.

Do not explain why.



Step 5 — Written answers



* What is one repetitive task you enjoy and why?

* What does this quote mean to you: “Work is love made visible.” – Khalil Gibran



Step 6 — Final instruction

At the end of your
, include:

“Details matter.”



We look forward to meeting you!

title: Virtual AI Automation Assistant (Recruitment Ops)
description:
Virtual AI Automation Assistant (Recruitment Ops)



Role Overview

We are looking for a tech-savvy Virtual Assistant to build and manage a next-generation "Talent-as-a-Service" (TaaS) infrastructure. You will not just be sourcing candidates; you will be building the "pipes" that automate lead generation, candidate summaries, and client reporting using AI and low-code tools.



Key Responsibilities

Workflow Automation: Build and maintain automated "scenarios" in 
 or Zapier to move data between LinkedIn, our database, and client portals.



AI Enrichment & Scraping: Use tools like Clay, PhantomBuster, or Proxycurl to scrape company org charts and enrich candidate profiles with deep insights (podcasts, news, social activity).



Database Management: Maintain our custom "ATS" built on Airtable and Notion, ensuring data integrity and automated syncing.



Personalized Outreach at Scale: Set up AI-driven
 and LinkedIn campaigns that use LLMs (like GPT-4) to write hyper-personalized messages to founders and talent leads.



AI Interview Summaries: Manage the flow of interview recordings into AI tools (e.g., Metaview, Fireflies) and ensure summaries are polished and delivered to clients in branded Notion docs.



Required Technical Stack

Automation: Expert level in 
 (preferred) or Zapier.



Data & CRM: Mastery of Airtable (formulas, interfaces, and automations) and Notion.



Enrichment: Proven experience with Clay (specifically building "waterfalls").



AI Tools: High proficiency in prompting ChatGPT/Claude API, and familiarity with ElevenLabs (voice cloning) is a plus.



Scraping: Experience with PhantomBuster, Apify, or similar LinkedIn scraping tools.



About You

Problem Solver: When an API connection breaks or a scraper is blocked, you don't wait for instructions—you find a workaround.



Attention to Detail: You understand that "AI-generated" content must still feel human. You have a sharp eye for editing AI outputs to ensure they match our brand voice.



Startup Speed: You are comfortable working in a fast-paced, "embedded" environment where we pivot quickly based on client needs.

title: Senior Experienced Project Manager & Call Handler (Property Maintenance & Renovations) – Remote Role
description:
Hello :)



PLEASE READ CAREFULLY BEFORE APPLYING 



We take great pride in our thorough and rigorous recruitment process. Please do NOT apply unless you have substantial experience working remotely in property maintenance and improvement – including handyman services, renovations, plumbing, and painting.



This is a fully remote position, and we are specifically looking for candidates who have previously worked remotely in this field.



We are not a property management company; we specialise in property maintenance. If you're unsure about the difference between the two, this role may not be the right fit for you. We need someone with extensive experience in maintenance, repairs, and refurbishments who understands the technical aspects of keeping properties in top condition and can effectively coordinate work from a remote setting.



Do you fit the role?

-Are you a highly experienced and skilled Project Manager (Maintenance Coordinator) with a passion for property maintenance and improvement?

- Do you have at least five years of remote work experience in this sector?

-Can you confidently handle client PHONE CALLS and manage communication professionally?

- Do you excel in time management, organisation, and remote team coordination?



If so, this could be a fantastic opportunity for you!



About Us

We are a well-respected property maintenance and improvement company based in London, UK. We focus on delivering high-quality services and take pride in our professionalism, attention to detail, and customer satisfaction.



Position Overview

We are looking for a Project Manager with at least five years of full-time remote experience in the property maintenance and improvement sector (covering renovations, plumbing, electrical, and handyman jobs). The ideal candidate will have a STRONG background in construction and renovation, with a very deep understanding of property maintenance challenges and solutions.



This role requires exceptional attention to detail, strong communication skills, and the ability to manage tasks efficiently from a remote setting.



Essential Requirements



1. Remote Experience

Minimum 2 years of experience in property maintenance and improvement, working remotely with construction or renovation companies. [PLEASE NOTE YOU MUST HAVE WORKED REMOTELY, WORKING FOR THE LOCAL MARKET IS NOT SUFFICIENT. ]

Experience in managing remote teams and coordinating jobs without being on-site.



2. Language & Communication

Fluent in spoken and written English, with a clear, neutral accent.



3. Job Management Systems & CRM

Proficiency in job management systems such as ServiceM8, 
, or similar.



4. Time Management & Administration

Ability to handle multiple tasks efficiently in a remote setting.



5. Telephone Skills

Exceptional phone skills for handling client inquiries, scheduling, and team coordination.



6. Initiative & Self-Motivation

Proactive and self-driven – someone who takes the initiative and continuously seeks process improvements.



7. Responsiveness & Urgency

Quick to respond to
s and phone calls, handling matters with a sense of urgency.

Comfortable with voice and video calls when required.



8. Quoting & Invoicing

Ability to prepare accurate quotes and invoices independently.



9. Note-Taking & Follow-Up

Excellent record-keeping – maintaining detailed notes on jobs, timesheets, and meetings, and ensuring timely follow-ups with customers and staff.



10. Staff Management

Experience in coordinating and managing field staff remotely.



11. Working Hours

8:00 AM – 5:30 PM GMT (UK Time) – you must be available during UK working hours.



Why Join Us?

-Work remotely with a reputable UK-based company.

- Join a passionate and professional team.

- Use your expertise to make a real impact.

- Be part of a company that values excellence, attention to detail, and high standards.



How to Apply

Please ONLY apply if you meet all the above requirements and have extensive experience in remote property maintenance coordination.



To apply:

1) Send your updated CV.

2) AT THE SAME TIME Record a short video (via Loom or Google Drive) explaining:



-Your relevant remote work experience.

-Why you are a great fit for this role. And how you can handle phone calls to make sales.





This ensures that only serious applicants who have read the job description carefully are considered.



Applications without a video will not be reviewed.





Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.





In summary





This role requires strong sales abilities and the confidence to engage with new clients over the phone. You must have a proven track record in selling property maintenance services to new customers on the phone, as this is not an easy job.



Fluency in UK English is essential—you must be able to communicate clearly, understand client needs, and convince potential customers to use our services. While training will be provided, this role is not suitable for those who have never sold to brand-new customers or lack experience in converting inquiries into bookings.



In summary, we need someone who can handle calls exceptionally well, build trust with clients, and demonstrate strong technical knowledge of the property maintenance sector to guide them effectively.



We look forward to welcoming an exceptional remote Project Manager / Maintenance Coordinator to our team!

title: Senior Affiliate Manager (Lead Generation – Financial Verticals)
description:
About the Role:

We’re hiring a hands-on Senior Affiliate Manager to scale lead generation campaigns across financial verticals (insurance, home improvement, loans).



This is a performance-focused role - you’ll be responsible for growing affiliate partnerships, managing campaigns, and ensuring high-quality, scalable lead flow with an EPC-first mindset.



Responsibilities:

Recruit, onboard, and activate new affiliates (media buyers, networks, publishers)

Manage and scale relationships with existing partners

Identify high-potential affiliates based on volume and lead quality

Launch and manage lead-gen campaigns across native, display, social, and other traffic sources

Optimize performance through continuous testing and iteration

Manage caps and traffic allocation across partners

Match the right offers to the right traffic sources

Monitor traffic quality and prevent fraud or low-intent leads

Handle creative and content pre-approvals



Requirements (Must-Have):

At least 2 years of experience in affiliate / performance marketing

Experience with RedTrack and Affise

Strong technical skills (postback setup, tracking, troubleshooting)

Proven experience in lead generation campaigns

Strong understanding of RevShare / CPL models and affiliate economics (EPC-first mindset)

Existing network of affiliates in lead-gen

High attention to detail

High availability (responsive, able to manage time-sensitive campaigns and partner communication)





Important – Required to Apply:

To be considered for this role, you must answer the following questions. Applications without answers will not be reviewed.



1. Describe your experience in affiliate / performance marketing. What verticals have you worked in?

2. What lead generation campaigns have you managed? (insurance, loans, home improvement, etc.)

3. What was your exact role - affiliate manager, media buyer, or both? What were your day-to-day responsibilities?

title: Senior Experienced Project Manager & Call Handler (Property Maintenance & Renovations) – Remote Role
description:
Hello :)



PLEASE READ CAREFULLY BEFORE APPLYING



We take great pride in our thorough and rigorous recruitment process. Please do NOT apply unless you have substantial experience working remotely in property maintenance and improvement – including handyman services, renovations, plumbing, and painting.



This is a fully remote position, and we are specifically looking for candidates who have previously worked remotely in this field.



We are not a property management company; we specialise in property maintenance. If you're unsure about the difference between the two, this role may not be the right fit for you. We need someone with extensive experience in maintenance, repairs, and refurbishments who understands the technical aspects of keeping properties in top condition and can effectively coordinate work from a remote setting.



Do you fit the role?

-Are you a highly experienced and skilled Project Manager (Maintenance Coordinator) with a passion for property maintenance and improvement?

- Do you have at least five years of remote work experience in this sector?

-Can you confidently handle client PHONE CALLS and manage communication professionally?

- Do you excel in time management, organisation, and remote team coordination?



If so, this could be a fantastic opportunity for you!



About Us

We are a well-respected property maintenance and improvement company based in London, UK. We focus on delivering high-quality services and take pride in our professionalism, attention to detail, and customer satisfaction.



Position Overview

We are looking for a Project Manager with at least five years of full-time remote experience in the property maintenance and improvement sector (covering renovations, plumbing, electrical, and handyman jobs). The ideal candidate will have a STRONG background in construction and renovation, with a very deep understanding of property maintenance challenges and solutions.



This role requires exceptional attention to detail, strong communication skills, and the ability to manage tasks efficiently from a remote setting.



Essential Requirements



1. Remote Experience

Minimum 2 years of experience in property maintenance and improvement, working remotely with construction or renovation companies. [PLEASE NOTE YOU MUST HAVE WORKED REMOTELY, WORKING FOR THE LOCAL MARKET IS NOT SUFFICIENT. ]

Experience in managing remote teams and coordinating jobs without being on-site.



2. Language & Communication

Fluent in spoken and written English, with a clear, neutral accent.



3. Job Management Systems & CRM

Proficiency in job management systems such as ServiceM8, 
, or similar.



4. Time Management & Administration

Ability to handle multiple tasks efficiently in a remote setting.



5. Telephone Skills

Exceptional phone skills for handling client inquiries, scheduling, and team coordination.



6. Initiative & Self-Motivation

Proactive and self-driven – someone who takes the initiative and continuously seeks process improvements.



7. Responsiveness & Urgency

Quick to respond to
s and phone calls, handling matters with a sense of urgency.

Comfortable with voice and video calls when required.



8. Quoting & Invoicing

Ability to prepare accurate quotes and invoices independently.



9. Note-Taking & Follow-Up

Excellent record-keeping – maintaining detailed notes on jobs, timesheets, and meetings, and ensuring timely follow-ups with customers and staff.



10. Staff Management

Experience in coordinating and managing field staff remotely.



11. Working Hours

8:00 AM – 5:30 PM GMT (UK Time) – you must be available during UK working hours.



Why Join Us?

-Work remotely with a reputable UK-based company.

- Join a passionate and professional team.

- Use your expertise to make a real impact.

- Be part of a company that values excellence, attention to detail, and high standards.



How to Apply

Please ONLY apply if you meet all the above requirements and have extensive experience in remote property maintenance coordination.



To apply:

1) Send your updated CV.

2) AT THE SAME TIME Record a short video (via Loom or Google Drive) explaining:



-Your relevant remote work experience.

-Why you are a great fit for this role. And how you can handle phone calls to make sales.





This ensures that only serious applicants who have read the job description carefully are considered.



Applications without a video will not be reviewed.





Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.





In summary





This role requires strong sales abilities and the confidence to engage with new clients over the phone. You must have a proven track record in selling property maintenance services to new customers on the phone, as this is not an easy job.



Fluency in UK English is essential—you must be able to communicate clearly, understand client needs, and convince potential customers to use our services. While training will be provided, this role is not suitable for those who have never sold to brand-new customers or lack experience in converting inquiries into bookings.



In summary, we need someone who can handle calls exceptionally well, build trust with clients, and demonstrate strong technical knowledge of the property maintenance sector to guide them effectively.



We look forward to welcoming an exceptional remote Project Manager / Maintenance Coordinator to our team!

title: Podcast Editor / Video Producer
description:
About Us

Level Next Consulting & Marketing is a San Diego-based digital marketing agency. We act as the full marketing department for our clients at a fraction of the cost of an in-house team. We produce podcasts, videos, social content, SEO,
 marketing, and paid ads for a growing roster of real estate, legal, financial, and wellness brands.

Our team is nine people, and most of our staff is based in the Philippines. We work closely together, communicate on Slack, and move fast. Our Filipino tea
mbers are the backbone of this agency and we treat them that way — fair pay, long-term work, real growth opportunities, and a real seat at the table.

We are growing quickly and need another strong editor to join the team.



The Role

We are looking for a skilled podcast and video editor to take ownership of our long-form content pipeline. You will edit podcasts and video interviews for 6+ recurring clients every week, polish them to a professional standard, and prepare them for publishing.

This is a long-term role for someone who wants to grow with us. As the agency scales, this role will grow into a podcast producer position with more responsibility and more pay.



What You Will Do



Edit weekly long-form podcasts and video interviews for our recurring clients

Add intros, outros, transitions, and branded polish to every episode

Clean up audio — remove filler words, silences, background noise, and mistakes

Color correct and stabilize video where needed

Add captions, lower thirds, and b-roll to video podcasts and interviews

Pull b-roll and stock footage from Adobe Stock to support storytelling

Export final files in the correct specs for YouTube, Spotify, Podbean, and social

Deliver clean master files and short highlight clips ready for our social team to repurpose

Communicate daily on Slack with our Client Success Coordinator and the broader team





What You Need to Have



Minimum 2 years of professional podcast editing or video editing experience

Proficiency in Descript, CapCut, and Adobe Stock (we already have all licenses)

Strong ear for audio — you can hear when something is off and fix it

Strong eye for visual polish — pacing, transitions, cuts, and framing

Ability to edit both audio-only podcasts and video podcasts / interviews

Fast, reliable internet and a computer that can handle heavy video editing

Excellent written English and clear communication on Slack

Organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple client deadlines at once

Able to take direction, but also think independently and flag issues before they become problems



Nice to Have (Bonus)



Experience with Adobe Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve

Experience cutting short-form clips for Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts

Experience publishing directly to YouTube, Podbean, or Spotify

Motion graphics or basic After Effects skills

Experience working with US-based agencies or clients





Workload



6+ recurring clients currently, growing as the agency grows

Mix of weekly and bi-weekly podcast and video shoots

Full-time hours (approximately 40 hours per week)





What We Offer



Competitive full-time salary (will discuss based on experience)

13th month pay

Paid Philippine holidays

Paid time off after probation period

Long-term, stable work with a growing agency

Clear path to grow into a Podcast Producer role with more responsibility and pay

Supportive, collaborative team that respects your work and your time

All software licenses provided (Descript, CapCut, Adobe Stock, and more as needed)





How to Apply

To make sure you read the full job post, please follow these instructions exactly:



Subject line: Start your application with "Podcast Editor — [Your Name]"

In your application, please include:



A short introduction about yourself and your editing experience

Your years of experience with Descript, CapCut, and any other editing software

Links to 2–3 podcast or video samples you have personally edited (Google Drive, YouTube, Vimeo, or portfolio links are fine)

Your current availability and when you could start

Your expected monthly salary in USD





Answer this question in your application: What is the first thing you do when you open a raw podcast recording to begin editing it?



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.

We review every application that follows the steps above. If your work and experience look like a fit, we will reach out to set up a short interview and a paid test project.

Looking forward to meeting you.

— The Level Next Team

title: Sales Call Setter & Sales Management Career in 2026
description:
Who are we:



At Connex Partners, we’ve been redefining the intersection of advisory services and executive networks since 2006. As a concierge consultancy, we serve mid and large sized enterprise employers in the HR Space, and US healthcare providers, and the innovative solution partners that support them.



We are going to be rapidly expanding in 2026 - and we’re looking for several strategic, quick thinking consultative Sales Associates to join our remote team. Fully paid and ongoing sales and sales management training and development is provided. It's less important whether you have relevant sales experience or not, What we do look for is your character, the degree of career focus and motivation, how willing and able are you to be trained, can you quickly think and effectively act outside of the lines, and the fluency of your English in a B2B US setting.



What You’ll Do;



Conduct consultative outreach and sales calls to senior executives (B2B) from mid and larger sized US Businesses., initiating meaningful conversations that secure a sales appointment.

Listen to and Understand the clients and their specific pain points and position Connex's services as value-driven solutions.

Effectively and creatively use tools like Linked In for outreach

Collaborate with U.S.-based teams providing candid feedback to help refine your own sales messaging, improve the outreach processes and sales sequences to find new best sales and practices.

Continually learn, improve and grow and earn a lot more in 2026 than you did last year.



What We’re Looking For Individuals who have:



Fluent spoken and written English with a reasonably neutral accent

Ideally 1+ years of B2B selling experience in the US, Canada, UK ideally engaging C-level or VP-level stakeholders in larger business's

Strong critical and quick thinking ability. They can quickly read any situation and intuitively pivot to the smartest most optimal way of doing something.

Self confidence, grit, accountability, honesty , a positive disposition and humor.

A drive to have a career in sales or sales management and the ability to earn what they are really worth. They want to be promoted based solely on their skills, results and innate potential to be an excellent Manager or leader.

Enough self motivation that they excel with autonomy. They work incredibly hard not because they are being asked but because to seize this fantastic career opportunity they need to run their own race and not be slowed by others.



Compensation & Career Advancement :



$6-$10 USD/hour starting rate, with salary increases based on performance (3-12months)

Monthly Commissions & Bonuses + regular Performance Incentives

Full-time role with long-term growth potential

Rapid Managerial & leadership promotional opportunities (3-6 months)

Collaborative team culture where you still have real autonomy to totally manage your own time , earnings and career

Fully paid sales and sales management Training and Development

If you're energized by meaningful B2B conversations, you can think beyond scripts, and you want to be part of a company where you can truly control your own career and advancement destiny then - we immediately want to hear from you.



To Apply:



Please attach your Resume in a PDF link, plus include a Video OR Audio Link about yourself. Please
 to 
 use Reference SMGT
